sqlMap.select: SELECT BOARDGROUPID FROM TBL_Board_BoardInfo WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_REDIRECTBOARDID#
SELECT BOARDID, TABUSED, VIEWORDER FROM TBL_BOARD_NEWBOARD_ORDERINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# AND USERID = #v_USERID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_Board_MyBoards SET TABUSED = #tabUsed#, VIEWORDER = #viewOrder# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND USERID = 'everyone'

select.isEqual:
(SELECT BOARDID , CASE WHEN ( (CASE WHEN #v_LANG# = '1' THEN BOARDNAME WHEN #v_LANG# = '2' THEN BOARDNAME2 WHEN #v_LANG# = '3' THEN BOARDNAME3 WHEN #v_LANG# = '4' THEN BOARDNAME4 WHEN #v_LANG# = '6' THEN BOARDNAME6 ELSE BOARDNAME END) = '' OR (CASE WHEN #v_LANG# = '1' THEN BOARDNAME WHEN #v_LANG# = '2' THEN BOARDNAME2 WHEN #v_LANG# = '3' THEN BOARDNAME3 WHEN #v_LANG# = '4' THEN BOARDNAME4 WHEN #v_LANG# = '6' THEN BOARDNAME6 ELSE BOARDNAME END) IS NULL ) THEN BOARDNAME ELSE (CASE WHEN #v_LANG# = '1' THEN BOARDNAME WHEN #v_LANG# = '2' THEN BOARDNAME2 WHEN #v_LANG# = '3' THEN BOARDNAME3 WHEN #v_LANG# = '4' THEN BOARDNAME4 WHEN #v_LANG# = '6' THEN BOARDNAME6 ELSE BOARDNAME END) END BOARDNAME, TABUSED, VIEWORDER FROM TBL_Board_MyBoards WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND (COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# OR COMPANYID = '*') AND USERID = #v_USERID#)
UNION
(SELECT * FROM (SELECT A.BOARDID , CASE WHEN ( (CASE WHEN #v_LANG# = '1' THEN A.BOARDNAME WHEN #v_LANG# = '2' THEN A.BOARDNAME2 WHEN #v_LANG# = '3' THEN A.BOARDNAME3 WHEN #v_LANG# = '4' THEN A.BOARDNAME4 WHEN #v_LANG# = '6' THEN A.BOARDNAME6 ELSE A.BOARDNAME END) = '' OR (CASE WHEN #v_LANG# = '1' THEN A.BOARDNAME WHEN #v_LANG# = '2' THEN A.BOARDNAME2 WHEN #v_LANG# = '3' THEN A.BOARDNAME3 WHEN #v_LANG# = '4' THEN A.BOARDNAME4 WHEN #v_LANG# = '6' THEN A.BOARDNAME6 ELSE A.BOARDNAME END) IS NULL ) THEN A.BOARDNAME ELSE (CASE WHEN #v_LANG# = '1' THEN A.BOARDNAME WHEN #v_LANG# = '2' THEN A.BOARDNAME2 WHEN #v_LANG# = '3' THEN A.BOARDNAME3 WHEN #v_LANG# = '4' THEN A.BOARDNAME4 WHEN #v_LANG# = '6' THEN A.BOARDNAME6 ELSE A.BOARDNAME END) END BOARDNAME, B.TABUSED, B.VIEWORDER FROM TBL_Board_MyBoards A JOIN TBL_BOARD_NEWBOARD_ORDERINFO B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ( (A.COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# AND B.COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID#) OR (TRIM(A.COMPANYID) = '' AND B.COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID#) ) AND A.USERID = 'everyone' AND B.USERID = #v_USERID# ORDER BY A.BOARDID ASC) WHERE rownum = 1)
ORDER BY VIEWORDER ASC

(SELECT A.BOARDID , CASE WHEN ( (CASE WHEN #v_LANG# = '1' THEN A.BOARDNAME WHEN #v_LANG# = '2' THEN A.BOARDNAME2 WHEN #v_LANG# = '3' THEN A.BOARDNAME3 WHEN #v_LANG# = '4' THEN A.BOARDNAME4 WHEN #v_LANG# = '6' THEN A.BOARDNAME6 ELSE A.BOARDNAME END) = '' OR (CASE WHEN #v_LANG# = '1' THEN A.BOARDNAME WHEN #v_LANG# = '2' THEN A.BOARDNAME2 WHEN #v_LANG# = '3' THEN A.BOARDNAME3 WHEN #v_LANG# = '4' THEN A.BOARDNAME4 WHEN #v_LANG# = '6' THEN A.BOARDNAME6 ELSE A.BOARDNAME END) IS NULL ) THEN A.BOARDNAME ELSE (CASE WHEN #v_LANG# = '1' THEN A.BOARDNAME WHEN #v_LANG# = '2' THEN A.BOARDNAME2 WHEN #v_LANG# = '3' THEN A.BOARDNAME3 WHEN #v_LANG# = '4' THEN A.BOARDNAME4 WHEN #v_LANG# = '6' THEN A.BOARDNAME6 ELSE A.BOARDNAME END) END BOARDNAME, TABUSED , B.GUBUN , A.VIEWORDER FROM TBL_Board_MyBoards A JOIN TBL_Board_BoardInfo B ON A.BoardID = B.BoardID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND (B.COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# OR TRIM(B.COMPANYID) = '' OR B.COMPANYID IS NULL) AND USERID = #v_USERID# AND TABUSED = 'Y')
UNION
(SELECT * FROM (SELECT A.BOARDID , CASE WHEN ( (CASE WHEN #v_LANG# = '1' THEN A.BOARDNAME WHEN #v_LANG# = '2' THEN A.BOARDNAME2 WHEN #v_LANG# = '3' THEN A.BOARDNAME3 WHEN #v_LANG# = '4' THEN A.BOARDNAME4 WHEN #v_LANG# = '6' THEN A.BOARDNAME6 ELSE A.BOARDNAME END) = '' OR (CASE WHEN #v_LANG# = '1' THEN A.BOARDNAME WHEN #v_LANG# = '2' THEN A.BOARDNAME2 WHEN #v_LANG# = '3' THEN A.BOARDNAME3 WHEN #v_LANG# = '4' THEN A.BOARDNAME4 WHEN #v_LANG# = '6' THEN A.BOARDNAME6 ELSE A.BOARDNAME END) IS NULL ) THEN A.BOARDNAME ELSE (CASE WHEN #v_LANG# = '1' THEN A.BOARDNAME WHEN #v_LANG# = '2' THEN A.BOARDNAME2 WHEN #v_LANG# = '3' THEN A.BOARDNAME3 WHEN #v_LANG# = '4' THEN A.BOARDNAME4 WHEN #v_LANG# = '6' THEN A.BOARDNAME6 ELSE A.BOARDNAME END) END BOARDNAME, C.TABUSED , B.GUBUN , C.VIEWORDER FROM TBL_Board_MyBoards A JOIN TBL_Board_BoardInfo B ON A.BoardID = B.BoardID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID JOIN TBL_BOARD_NEWBOARD_ORDERINFO C ON A.BoardID = B.BoardID AND A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ( (A.COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# AND C.COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID#) OR (TRIM(A.COMPANYID) = '' AND C.COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID#) ) AND A.USERID = 'everyone' AND C.USERID = #v_USERID# AND C.TABUSED = 'Y' ORDER BY A.BOARDID ASC) WHERE rownum = 1) ORDER BY VIEWORDER ASC

sqlMap.select: SELECT BOARDGROUPID FROM TBL_Board_BoardInfo WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_BOARDID#

SELECT CASE WHEN ( (CASE WHEN #v_LANG# = '1' THEN BOARDNAME WHEN #v_LANG# = '2' THEN BOARDNAME2 WHEN #v_LANG# = '3' THEN BOARDNAME3 WHEN #v_LANG# = '4' THEN BOARDNAME4 ELSE BOARDNAME END) = '' OR (CASE WHEN #v_LANG# = '1' THEN BOARDNAME WHEN #v_LANG# = '2' THEN BOARDNAME2 WHEN #v_LANG# = '3' THEN BOARDNAME3 WHEN #v_LANG# = '4' THEN BOARDNAME4 ELSE BOARDNAME END) IS NULL ) THEN BOARDNAME ELSE (CASE WHEN #v_LANG# = '1' THEN BOARDNAME WHEN #v_LANG# = '2' THEN BOARDNAME2 WHEN #v_LANG# = '3' THEN BOARDNAME3 WHEN #v_LANG# = '4' THEN BOARDNAME4 ELSE BOARDNAME END) END BOARDNAME FROM TBL_Board_BoardInfo WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_BOARDGROUPID#

LISTTYPE = '1'
LISTTYPE = #v_LISTCODE#
AND VIEW_FG = 'Y' ORDER BY SN

LISTTYPE = '1'
LISTTYPE = #v_LISTCODE#
AND VIEW_FG = 'Y' ORDER BY SN
isNotEmpty.isNotEqual:
SELECT CASE WHEN #v_PSTRLANG# = '1' THEN NAME1 WHEN #v_PSTRLANG# = '2' THEN NAME2 WHEN #v_PSTRLANG# = '3' THEN NAME3 WHEN #v_PSTRLANG# = '4' THEN NAME4 WHEN #v_PSTRLANG# = '6' THEN NAME6 ELSE NAME1 END AS NAME, WIDTH, COLNAME FROM TBL_Board_Item_ListOption WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND
LISTTYPE = '1'
LISTTYPE = #v_LISTCODE#
AND VIEW_FG = 'Y' ORDER BY SN

sqlMap.select: SELECT DISTINCT BOARDID FROM TBL_Board_Item_ListOption_Boar WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID#

select.isEmpty: SELECT NAME1 AS NAME, WIDTH, COLNAME FROM TBL_Board_Item_ListOption_Boar WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# AND VIEW_FG = 'Y' ORDER BY SN

isNotEmpty.isEqual: SELECT NAME1, NAME2, NAME3, NAME4, NAME6, WIDTH, COLNAME FROM TBL_Board_Item_ListOption_Boar WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# AND VIEW_FG = 'Y' ORDER BY SN
isNotEmpty.isNotEqual: SELECT CASE WHEN #v_PSTRLANG# = '1' THEN NAME1 WHEN #v_PSTRLANG# = '2' THEN NAME2 WHEN #v_PSTRLANG# = '3' THEN NAME3 WHEN #v_PSTRLANG# = '4' THEN NAME4 WHEN #v_PSTRLANG# = '6' THEN NAME6 ELSE NAME1 END AS NAME, WIDTH, COLNAME FROM TBL_Board_Item_ListOption_Boar WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# AND VIEW_FG = 'Y' ORDER BY SN

sqlMap.select:
SELECT * FROM (SELECT T1.*, rownum as RN FROM (SELECT IMAGEID, FILEPATH, FILECONTENT, MAIN_FLAG FLAG, IMAGENAME FROM TBL_Photo_ImageItem WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ItemID = #v_pItemID# AND BoardID = #v_pBoardID# ORDER BY IMAGEID ASC ) T1 )
WHERE RN <= #v_pEndRow# AND RN >= #v_pStartRow#
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_Photo_ImageItem WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ItemID = #v_pItemID# AND BoardID = #v_pBoardID#
SELECT IMAGEID , FILEPATH , FILECONTENT , IMAGENAME , MAIN_FLAG FLAG FROM TBL_Photo_ImageItem WHERE tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND ItemID = #v_pItemID# AND BoardID = #v_pBoardID# ORDER BY IMAGEID ASC
SELECT MAX(IMAGEID) FROM TBL_Photo_ImageItem WHERE tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND ItemID = #v_pItemID# AND BoardID = #v_pBoardID# AND LENGTH(RTRIM(IMAGEID)) != 38

SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM (SELECT Row_Number() OVER ( ORDER BY
A.Attachments A.Title B.BoardName A.StartDate A.EndDate
DESC
TO_NUMBER(A.ParentWriteDate) ASC
) AS RNUM, A.ITEMID, A.STARTDATE, A.ENDDATE, A.TITLE, A.ATTACHMENTS, FILENAME, FILEPATH, A.IMPORTANCE, B.BOARDID, CASE WHEN ( (CASE WHEN #lang# = '1' THEN BOARDNAME WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN BOARDNAME2 WHEN #lang# = '3' THEN BOARDNAME3 WHEN #lang# = '4' THEN BOARDNAME4 WHEN #lang# = '6' THEN BOARDNAME6 ELSE BOARDNAME END) = '' OR (CASE WHEN #lang# = '1' THEN BOARDNAME WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN BOARDNAME2 WHEN #lang# = '3' THEN BOARDNAME3 WHEN #lang# = '4' THEN BOARDNAME4 WHEN #lang# = '6' THEN BOARDNAME6 ELSE BOARDNAME END) IS NULL ) THEN B.BOARDNAME ELSE (CASE WHEN #lang# = '1' THEN BOARDNAME WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN BOARDNAME2 WHEN #lang# = '3' THEN BOARDNAME3 WHEN #lang# = '4' THEN BOARDNAME4 WHEN #lang# = '6' THEN BOARDNAME6 ELSE BOARDNAME END) END BOARDNAME, A.ABSTRACT, A.DOCNO FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM A JOIN (SELECT BOARDID, BOARDNAME, BOARDNAME2, BOARDNAME3, BOARDNAME4, BOARDNAME6, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID FROM TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#) B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.BOARDID = B.BOARDID LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 0 THEN 'NONE' WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 1 THEN MAX(TO_CHAR(FILENAME)) ELSE 'MANY' END AS FILENAME, CASE WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 0 THEN 'NONE' WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 1 THEN MAX(TO_CHAR(FILEPATH)) ELSE 'MANY' END AS FILEPATH, TENANT_ID, itemid FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_ATTACHMENTS GROUP BY ITEMID, TENANT_ID ) F ON A.ITEMID = F.ITEMID AND A.TENANT_ID = F.TENANT_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND (A.WRITERCOMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# OR TRIM(B.COMPANYID) = '' OR B.COMPANYID IS NULL) AND A.WRITERID = #v_PUSERID#
AND A.STARTDATE > #nowDate#) T1 WHERE RNUM <= #v_PENDROW#) T2 WHERE RNUM >= #v_PSTARTROW#

SELECT COUNT(A.ITEMID) CNT FROM TBL_Board_Item A JOIN ( SELECT BOARDID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_Board_MyBoards WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND (COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# OR COMPANYID = '*') AND UserID = #v_pUserID# ) B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.BoardID = B.boardid INNER JOIN TBL_Board_BoardInfo P ON A.TENANT_ID = P.TENANT_ID AND A.BOARDID = P.BOARDID LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER( PARTITION BY PARENTITEMID ORDER BY VERSION DESC ) RN, ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_BOARD_MODIFYHISTORY ) M1 WHERE M1.RN = 1 ) M2 ON A.ITEMID = M2.ITEMID AND A.TENANT_ID = M2.TENANT_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND (A.WRITERCOMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# OR TRIM(A.WRITERCOMPANYID) = '' OR A.WRITERCOMPANYID IS NULL OR TRIM(P.COMPANYID) = '' OR P.COMPANYID IS NULL) AND P.GUBUN != '5' AND (A.APPRFLAG = 'Y' OR A.APPRFLAG IS NULL) AND A.STARTDATE > TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#nowDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') - 5, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND A.STARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND A.ENDDATE > #nowDate# AND (NOT EXISTS (SELECT USERID FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_READ S WHERE S.TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND S.BOARDID = A.BOARDID AND S.ITEMID = A.ITEMID AND S.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND S.USERID = #v_pUserID# AND S.READDATE > TO_DATE(#nowDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') - 5)) AND (P.VERSIONMANAGE = 'Y' AND M2.ITEMID IS NOT NULL OR P.VERSIONMANAGE = 'N')

SELECT CASE WHEN LISTCOUNT IS NULL THEN 20 ELSE LISTCOUNT END LISTCOUNT, PREVIEW , PREVIEWWLIST , PREVIEWWCONTENT , PREVIEWHLIST , PREVIEWHCONTENT FROM TBL_Board_Configuration WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND USERID = #id#
SELECT ITEMID FROM TBL_Board_Item WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ITEMID = #itemID#

isEmpty.isNotEmpty:
SELECT A.TITLE TITLE, B.GUBUN, A.BOARDID BOARDID, CASE WHEN #lang# = '1' THEN B.BOARDNAME WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN COALESCE(NULLIF(B.BOARDNAME2, ''), B.BOARDNAME) WHEN #lang# = '3' THEN COALESCE(NULLIF(B.BOARDNAME3, ''), B.BOARDNAME) WHEN #lang# = '4' THEN COALESCE(NULLIF(B.BOARDNAME4, ''), B.BOARDNAME) WHEN #lang# = '6' THEN COALESCE(NULLIF(B.BOARDNAME6, ''), B.BOARDNAME) ELSE B.BOARDNAME END AS BOARDNAME,
A.WRITERNAME AS WRITERNAME,
A.WRITERNAME2 AS WRITERNAME,
A.CONTENTLOCATION, C.MAIL, A.ITEMID, A.WRITERID, A.WRITERDEPTID, A.TOPWRITERID, A.WRITEDATE, A.ENDDATE FROM TBL_Board_Item A JOIN TBL_Board_BoardInfo B ON A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id AND A.BoardID = B.BoardID JOIN TBL_USERMASTER C ON A.writerid = C.cn AND A.tenant_id = C.tenant_id WHERE A.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND A.ItemID = #itemID#
isEmpty.isEmpty: SELECT BOARDID, CONTENTLOCATION, ITEMID, TITLE, WRITERID FROM TBL_Board_Item_temp WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ITEMID = #itemID#

isNotEmpty.isNotEmpty:
SELECT A.TITLE TITLE, B.GUBUN, A.BOARDID BOARDID, CASE WHEN #lang# = '1' THEN B.BOARDNAME WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN COALESCE(NULLIF(B.BOARDNAME2, ''), B.BOARDNAME) WHEN #lang# = '3' THEN COALESCE(NULLIF(B.BOARDNAME3, ''), B.BOARDNAME) WHEN #lang# = '4' THEN COALESCE(NULLIF(B.BOARDNAME4, ''), B.BOARDNAME) WHEN #lang# = '6' THEN COALESCE(NULLIF(B.BOARDNAME6, ''), B.BOARDNAME) ELSE B.BOARDNAME END AS BOARDNAME,
A.WRITERNAME AS WRITERNAME,
A.WRITERNAME2 AS WRITERNAME,
A.CONTENTLOCATION, A.ITEMID, A.WRITERID, A.WRITERDEPTID, A.TOPWRITERID FROM TBL_Board_Item A JOIN TBL_Board_BoardInfo B ON A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id AND A.BoardID = B.BoardID WHERE A.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND A.ItemID = #itemID#
isNotEmpty.isEmpty: SELECT BOARDID, CONTENTLOCATION, ITEMID, TITLE, WRITERID FROM TBL_Board_Item_temp WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ITEMID = #itemID#

sqlMap.select:
SELECT * FROM (SELECT A.*, ROWNUM as RNUM FROM (SELECT USERID,
USERNAME, USERDEPTNAME, USERCOMPANYNAME, NVL(USERTITLE, '') AS USERTITLE,
USERNAME2 AS USERNAME, USERDEPTNAME2 AS USERDEPTNAME, USERCOMPANYNAME2 AS USERCOMPANYNAME, NVL(USERTITLE2, '') AS USERTITLE,
TO_CHAR(READDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as READDATE, TRIM(MIN(DEPTID)) AS DEPTID FROM TBL_Board_Item_Read A INNER JOIN (SELECT T.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY T.CN ORDER BY ROWNUM) CNT FROM ((SELECT D.CN, ' '||D.DEPARTMENT as DEPTID, D.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME as COMPANYID, D.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_USERMASTER D WHERE D.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# )
UNION ALL
(SELECT B.cn, A2.DEPTID, C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 as COMPANYID, A2.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_USERMASTER B INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A2 ON A2.CN = B.CN AND A2.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID RIGHT JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER C ON A2.DEPTID = C.CN AND B.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #companyID# WHERE A2.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#)) T ) TR ON A.USERID = TR.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = TR.TENANT_ID WHERE A.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND A.BoardID = #boardID# AND A.ItemID = #itemID# AND UserID <> (SELECT WRITERID FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ITEMID = #itemID#) GROUP BY USERID,
USERNAME, USERDEPTNAME, USERCOMPANYNAME, NVL(USERTITLE, ''),
USERNAME2, USERDEPTNAME2, USERCOMPANYNAME2, NVL(USERTITLE2, ''),
READDATE ORDER BY ReadDate DESC ) A WHERE
ROWNUM <= #start# + #perCount# ) WHERE RNUM >= #start# + 1

SELECT ITEMID , BOARDID , WRITERID , WRITERNAME , WRITERNAME2 , WRITERDEPTID , WRITERDEPTNAME , WRITERDEPTNAME2 , WRITERCOMPANYID , WRITERCOMPANYNAME , WRITERCOMPANYNAME2 , WRITEDATE , PARENTWRITEDATE , UPDATEDATE , IMPORTANCE , TITLE , CONTENTLOCATION , READCOUNT , STARTDATE , ENDDATE , ABSTRACT , ATTACHMENTS , UPPERITEMIDTREE , ITEMLEVEL , COPIEDITEM , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE32 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 , DOCNO , DOCPASSWORD , MAINCONTENT , NOTINO , TOPWRITERID , APPRFLAG , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 , CONTENT, NTSTARTDATE notiStart, NTENDDATE notiEnd FROM TBL_Board_Item WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ITEMID = #v_PORGITEMID#

select.isNotEmpty: SELECT ITEMID, TITLE FROM ( SELECT ITEMID, TITLE FROM TBL_Board_Item WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# AND PARENTWRITEDATE <= #v_PPARENTWRITEDATE# AND ITEMID <> #v_PITEMID# AND TO_CHAR(UPPERITEMIDTREE) NOT LIKE #v_PUPPERITEMIDTREE# || '%' AND STARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND ENDDATE > #nowDate# AND ITEMID <> #v_PREVIOUSITEMID# ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(PARENTWRITEDATE) DESC, TO_CHAR(UPPERITEMIDTREE) ASC, STARTDATE DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 1
select.isEmpty: SELECT ITEMID, TITLE FROM ( SELECT ITEMID, TITLE FROM TBL_Board_Item WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# AND PARENTWRITEDATE <= #v_PPARENTWRITEDATE# AND ITEMID <> #v_PITEMID# AND TO_CHAR(UPPERITEMIDTREE) NOT LIKE #v_PUPPERITEMIDTREE# || '%' AND STARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND ENDDATE > #nowDate# ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(PARENTWRITEDATE) DESC, TO_CHAR(UPPERITEMIDTREE) ASC, STARTDATE DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 1

sqlMap.select:
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM (SELECT Row_Number() OVER ( ORDER BY B.BOARDNAME A.ITEMID A.WRITERNAME A.WRITERDEPTNAME A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME A.WRITEDATE A.STARTDATE TO_NUMBER(A.PARENTWRITEDATE) A.TITLE A.ATTACHMENTS A.READCOUNT A.DOCNO DESC ) AS RNUM, A.BOARDID, B.BOARDNAME, A.ITEMID, A.WRITERID, A.WRITERNAME, A.WRITERDEPTNAME, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME, A.WRITEDATE, A.STARTDATE, A.PARENTWRITEDATE, A.IMPORTANCE, A.TITLE, A.ATTACHMENTS, EXT, FILEPATH, A.READCOUNT, A.ITEMLEVEL, A.ABSTRACT, B.BOARDNAME2 AS BOARDNAME2, A.WRITERNAME2, A.WRITERDEPTNAME2, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME2, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_Board_OneLineReply WHERE TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND ITEMID = A.ItemID AND (CONTENT IS NOT NULL OR IMAGECONTENT IS NOT NULL)) ONELINECNT, A.UPPERITEMIDTREE, A.DOCNO, '' AS NOTICE, P.GUBUN, A.MAINCONTENT, P.BOARDGROUPID FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM A INNER JOIN (SELECT BOARDID, BOARDNAME, BOARDNAME2, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID FROM TBL_BOARD_MYBOARDS WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND (COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# OR COMPANYID = '*') AND USERID = #v_PUSERID#) B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.BOARDID = B.BOARDID LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER( PARTITION BY PARENTITEMID ORDER BY VERSION DESC ) RN, ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_BOARD_MODIFYHISTORY ) M1 WHERE M1.RN = 1 ) M2 ON A.ITEMID = M2.ITEMID AND A.TENANT_ID = M2.TENANT_ID INNER JOIN TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO P ON A.TENANT_ID = P.TENANT_ID AND (A.WRITERCOMPANYID = P.COMPANYID OR TRIM(A.WRITERCOMPANYID) = '' OR A.WRITERCOMPANYID IS NULL OR TRIM(P.COMPANYID) = '' OR P.COMPANYID IS NULL) AND A.BOARDID = P.BOARDID AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND (A.WRITERCOMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# OR TRIM(A.WRITERCOMPANYID) = '' OR A.WRITERCOMPANYID IS NULL OR TRIM(P.COMPANYID) = '' OR P.COMPANYID IS NULL) AND
(A.APPRFLAG = 'Y' OR A.APPRFLAG IS NULL) AND A.STARTDATE > TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#nowDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') - 5, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND A.STARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND A.ENDDATE > #nowDate# AND (NOT EXISTS (SELECT USERID FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_READ S WHERE S.TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND S.BOARDID = A.BOARDID AND S.ITEMID = A.ITEMID AND S.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND S.USERID = #v_PUSERID# AND S.READDATE > TO_DATE(#nowDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') - 5)) LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 0 THEN 'NONE' WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 1 THEN MAX(TO_CHAR(FILENAME)) ELSE 'MANY' END AS EXT, CASE WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 0 THEN 'NONE' WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 1 THEN MAX(TO_CHAR(FILEPATH)) ELSE 'MANY' END AS FILEPATH, TENANT_ID, itemid FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_ATTACHMENTS GROUP BY ITEMID, TENANT_ID ) F ON A.ITEMID = F.ITEMID AND A.TENANT_ID = F.TENANT_ID WHERE (P.VERSIONMANAGE = 'Y' AND M2.ITEMID IS NOT NULL OR P.VERSIONMANAGE = 'N') ) T1 WHERE RNUM <= #v_PENDROW#) T2 WHERE RNUM >= #v_PSTARTROW#

SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM (SELECT Row_Number() OVER ( ORDER BY A.ITEMID A.WRITERNAME A.WRITERDEPTNAME A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME A.STARTDATE A.WRITEDATE A.TITLE A.ATTACHMENTS A.DOCNO TO_NUMBER(A.PARENTWRITEDATE) A.READCOUNT
LIKECOUNT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6 EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8 EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 DESC , TO_CHAR(A.UPPERITEMIDTREE) DESC ) AS RNUM, A.BOARDID, A.ITEMID, A.WRITERID, A.WRITERNAME, A.WRITERDEPTNAME, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME, A.STARTDATE, A.WRITEDATE, A.PARENTWRITEDATE, A.IMPORTANCE, A.TITLE, A.READCOUNT, A.ATTACHMENTS, EXT, FILEPATH, A.ITEMLEVEL, A.ABSTRACT, CASE WHEN D.TOTALCOUNT IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE '1' END READFLAG, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5, A.WRITERNAME2, A.WRITERDEPTNAME2, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME2, A.UPPERITEMIDTREE, A.DOCNO, '' AS NOTICE, A.MAINCONTENT, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10, (SELECT GUBUN FROM TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO B WHERE B.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND B.BOARDID = A.BOARDID) as GUBUN, NVL(LIKECOUNT, 0) as LIKECOUNT, NVL(DISLIKECOUNT, 0) as DISLIKECOUNT, A.PUBLICFLAG, A.WRITERDEPTID, NVL(A.WRITERNAMETYPE, '') as WRITERNAMETYPE FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM A LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT COUNT(USERID) AS TOTALCOUNT, ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_READ WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND USERID = #v_PUSERID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# GROUP BY ITEMID, TENANT_ID) D ON A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID AND A.ITEMID = D.ITEMID LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT COUNT(G.ITEMID) as LIKECOUNT, G.ITEMID, G.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_BOARD_LIKE G INNER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER H ON G.USERID = H.CN WHERE G.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# GROUP BY G.ITEMID, G.TENANT_ID) L ON A.TENANT_ID = L.TENANT_ID AND A.ITEMID = L.ITEMID
LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 0 THEN 'NONE' WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 1 THEN MAX(TO_CHAR(FILENAME)) ELSE 'MANY' END AS EXT, CASE WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 0 THEN 'NONE' WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 1 THEN MAX(TO_CHAR(FILEPATH)) ELSE 'MANY' END AS FILEPATH, TENANT_ID, itemid FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_ATTACHMENTS GROUP BY ITEMID, TENANT_ID ) F ON A.ITEMID = F.ITEMID AND A.TENANT_ID = F.TENANT_ID
LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 0 THEN 'NONE' WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 1 THEN MAX(TO_CHAR(IMAGENAME)) ELSE 'MANY' END AS EXT, CASE WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 0 THEN 'NONE' WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 1 THEN MAX(TO_CHAR(FILEPATH)) ELSE 'MANY' END AS FILEPATH, TENANT_ID, itemid FROM TBL_PHOTO_IMAGEITEM GROUP BY ITEMID, TENANT_ID ) F ON A.ITEMID = F.ITEMID AND A.TENANT_ID = F.TENANT_ID
LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT COUNT(K.ITEMID) as DISLIKECOUNT, K.ITEMID, K.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_BOARD_DISLIKE K INNER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER J ON K.USERID = J.CN WHERE K.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# GROUP BY K.ITEMID, K.TENANT_ID) M ON A.TENANT_ID = M.TENANT_ID AND A.ITEMID = M.ITEMID LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER( PARTITION BY PARENTITEMID ORDER BY VERSION DESC ) RN, ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_BOARD_MODIFYHISTORY ) M1 ON A.ITEMID = M1.ITEMID AND A.TENANT_ID = M1.TENANT_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND A.BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID#
M1.RN = 1
(M1.ITEMID IS NULL OR M1.RN = 1)
A.APPRFLAG = 'Y'
AND STARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND ENDDATE > #nowDate#) T1
AND STARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND ENDDATE > #nowDate# AND D.TOTALCOUNT IS NULL) T1
AND STARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND ENDDATE < #nowDate#) T1
WHERE RNUM <= #endRow#) T2 WHERE RNUM >= #startRow#

SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM (SELECT Row_Number() OVER ( ORDER BY A.ITEMID A.WRITERNAME A.WRITERDEPTNAME A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME A.STARTDATE A.WRITEDATE A.TITLE A.ATTACHMENTS A.DOCNO TO_NUMBER(A.PARENTWRITEDATE) A.READCOUNT LIKECOUNT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6 EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8 EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 DESC , TO_CHAR(A.UPPERITEMIDTREE) DESC ) AS RNUM, A.BOARDID, A.ITEMID, A.WRITERID, A.WRITERNAME, A.WRITERDEPTNAME, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME, A.STARTDATE, A.WRITEDATE, A.PARENTWRITEDATE, A.IMPORTANCE, A.TITLE, A.READCOUNT, A.ATTACHMENTS, EXT, FILEPATH, A.ITEMLEVEL, A.ABSTRACT, CASE WHEN D.TOTALCOUNT IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE '1' END READFLAG, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5, A.WRITERNAME2, A.WRITERDEPTNAME2, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME2, A.UPPERITEMIDTREE, A.DOCNO, '' AS NOTICE, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10, NVL(LIKECOUNT, 0) as LIKECOUNT, NVL(DISLIKECOUNT, 0) as DISLIKECOUNT, A.PUBLICFLAG FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM A LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT COUNT(USERID) AS TOTALCOUNT, ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_READ WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND USERID = #v_PUSERID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# GROUP BY ITEMID, TENANT_ID) D ON A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID AND A.ITEMID = D.ITEMID LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT COUNT(G.ITEMID) as LIKECOUNT, G.ITEMID, G.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_BOARD_LIKE G INNER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER H ON G.USERID = H.CN WHERE G.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# GROUP BY G.ITEMID, G.TENANT_ID) L ON A.TENANT_ID = L.TENANT_ID AND A.ITEMID = L.ITEMID LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 0 THEN 'NONE' WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 1 THEN MAX(TO_CHAR(FILENAME)) ELSE 'MANY' END AS EXT, CASE WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 0 THEN 'NONE' WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 1 THEN MAX(TO_CHAR(FILEPATH)) ELSE 'MANY' END AS FILEPATH, TENANT_ID, itemid FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_ATTACHMENTS GROUP BY ITEMID, TENANT_ID ) F ON A.ITEMID = F.ITEMID AND A.TENANT_ID = F.TENANT_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT COUNT(K.ITEMID) as DISLIKECOUNT, K.ITEMID, K.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_BOARD_DISLIKE K INNER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER J ON K.USERID = J.CN WHERE K.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# GROUP BY K.ITEMID, K.TENANT_ID) M ON A.TENANT_ID = M.TENANT_ID AND A.ITEMID = M.ITEMID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID#
(TOPWRITERID = #v_PUSERID# OR WRITERID = #v_PUSERID# OR EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = '1' )
AND STARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND ENDDATE > #nowDate#) T1
AND STARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND ENDDATE > #nowDate# AND D.TOTALCOUNT IS NULL) T1
AND STARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND ENDDATE < #nowDate#) T1
WHERE RNUM <= #endRow#) T2 WHERE RNUM >= #startRow#

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY A.NotiNo ASC, TO_NUMBER(A.ParentWriteDate) DESC, A.WriteDate DESC ) ROWNUM_ ,
A.BOARDID , A.ITEMID , A.WRITERID , A.WRITERNAME , A.WRITERDEPTNAME , A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME , A.STARTDATE , A.WRITEDATE , A.PARENTWRITEDATE , A.IMPORTANCE , A.TITLE , A.READCOUNT , A.ATTACHMENTS , EXT, FILEPATH, A.ITEMLEVEL , A.ABSTRACT , '0' READFLAG , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 , A.WRITERNAME2 , A.WRITERDEPTNAME2 , A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME2 , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_Board_OneLineReply WHERE TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND ITEMID = A.ITEMID AND (CONTENT IS NOT NULL OR IMAGECONTENT IS NOT NULL)) ONELINECNT, A.UPPERITEMIDTREE , A.DOCNO , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 NOTICE , A.NOTINO , A.MAINCONTENT , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10, ( SELECT GUBUN FROM TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO B WHERE B.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND B.BOARDID = A.BOARDID ) as GUBUN, (SELECT NVL(COUNT(*), 0) FROM TBL_Board_Like G INNER JOIN TBL_usermaster H ON G.USERID = H.CN WHERE G.TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND G.ITEMID = A.ItemID) as LIKECOUNT, (SELECT NVL(COUNT(*), 0) FROM TBL_Board_DisLike K INNER JOIN TBL_usermaster J ON K.USERID = J.CN WHERE K.TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND K.ITEMID = A.ItemID) as DISLIKECOUNT, A.PUBLICFLAG, A.WRITERDEPTID, NVL(A.WRITERNAMETYPE, '') as WRITERNAMETYPE FROM TBL_Board_Item A
LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 0 THEN 'NONE' WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 1 THEN MAX(TO_CHAR(FILENAME)) ELSE 'MANY' END AS EXT, CASE WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 0 THEN 'NONE' WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 1 THEN MAX(TO_CHAR(FILEPATH)) ELSE 'MANY' END AS FILEPATH, TENANT_ID, itemid FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_ATTACHMENTS GROUP BY ITEMID, TENANT_ID ) F ON A.ITEMID = F.ITEMID AND A.TENANT_ID = F.TENANT_ID
LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 0 THEN 'NONE' WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 1 THEN MAX(TO_CHAR(IMAGENAME)) ELSE 'MANY' END AS EXT, CASE WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 0 THEN 'NONE' WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 1 THEN MAX(TO_CHAR(FILEPATH)) ELSE 'MANY' END AS FILEPATH, TENANT_ID, itemid FROM TBL_PHOTO_IMAGEITEM GROUP BY ITEMID, TENANT_ID ) F ON A.ITEMID = F.ITEMID AND A.TENANT_ID = F.TENANT_ID
WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# AND STARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND ENDDATE > #nowDate# AND NTSTARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND NTENDDATE > #nowDate# AND extensionAttribute1 = '0' AND extensionAttribute2 = '1'
AND APPRFLAG = 'Y'
ORDER BY A.NotiNo ASC, TO_NUMBER(A.ParentWriteDate) DESC, A.WriteDate DESC ) T1 WHERE ROWNUM_ <= #v_END# ) T2 WHERE ROWNUM_ >= #v_START#

select.isEqual: SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM (SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(A.ParentWriteDate), A.WriteDate DESC ) ROWNUM_, A.BOARDID, A.ITEMID, A.WRITERID, A.WRITERNAME, A.WRITERDEPTNAME, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME, A.STARTDATE, A.WRITEDATE, A.PARENTWRITEDATE, A.IMPORTANCE, A.TITLE, A.READCOUNT, A.ATTACHMENTS, EXT, FILEPATH, A.ITEMLEVEL, A.ABSTRACT, '0' READFLAG, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5, A.WRITERNAME2, A.WRITERDEPTNAME2, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME2, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_Board_OneLineReply WHERE TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND ITEMID = A.ItemID AND (CONTENT IS NOT NULL OR IMAGECONTENT IS NOT NULL)) ONELINECNT, A.UPPERITEMIDTREE, A.DOCNO, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 NOTICE, CASE WHEN ( (CASE WHEN #lang# = '1' THEN BOARDNAME WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN BOARDNAME2 WHEN #lang# = '3' THEN BOARDNAME3 WHEN #lang# = '4' THEN BOARDNAME4 WHEN #lang# = '6' THEN BOARDNAME6 ELSE BOARDNAME END) = '' OR (CASE WHEN #lang# = '1' THEN BOARDNAME WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN BOARDNAME2 WHEN #lang# = '3' THEN BOARDNAME3 WHEN #lang# = '4' THEN BOARDNAME4 WHEN #lang# = '6' THEN BOARDNAME6 ELSE BOARDNAME END) IS NULL ) THEN B.BOARDNAME ELSE (CASE WHEN #lang# = '1' THEN BOARDNAME WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN BOARDNAME2 WHEN #lang# = '3' THEN BOARDNAME3 WHEN #lang# = '4' THEN BOARDNAME4 WHEN #lang# = '6' THEN BOARDNAME6 ELSE BOARDNAME END) END BOARDNAME, B.GUBUN AS GUBUN, A.APPRFLAG APPRFLAG, B.COMPANYID, A.PUBLICFLAG FROM TBL_Board_Item A JOIN TBL_Board_BoardInfo B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.BoardID = B.BoardID LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 0 THEN 'NONE' WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 1 THEN MAX(TO_CHAR(FILENAME)) ELSE 'MANY' END AS EXT, CASE WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 0 THEN 'NONE' WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 1 THEN MAX(TO_CHAR(FILEPATH)) ELSE 'MANY' END AS FILEPATH, TENANT_ID, itemid FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_ATTACHMENTS GROUP BY ITEMID, TENANT_ID ) F ON A.ITEMID = F.ITEMID AND A.TENANT_ID = F.TENANT_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND (A.WRITERCOMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# OR TRIM(B.COMPANYID) = '' OR B.COMPANYID IS NULL) AND WRITERID = #v_PUSERID# AND STARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND ENDDATE > #nowDate# AND extensionAttribute1 = '0' AND extensionAttribute2 = '1' AND (A.APPRFLAG = 'Y' OR A.APPRFLAG IS NULL) ORDER BY A.WriteDate DESC) T1 WHERE ROWNUM_ <= #v_END#) T2 WHERE ROWNUM_ >= #v_START#
select.isNotEqual: SELECT A.BOARDID, A.ITEMID, A.WRITERID, A.WRITERNAME, A.WRITERDEPTNAME, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME, A.STARTDATE, A.WRITEDATE, A.PARENTWRITEDATE, A.IMPORTANCE, A.TITLE, A.READCOUNT, A.ATTACHMENTS, EXT, FILEPATH, A.ITEMLEVEL, A.ABSTRACT, '0' READFLAG, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5, A.WRITERNAME2, A.WRITERDEPTNAME2, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME2, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_Board_OneLineReply WHERE TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND ITEMID = A.ItemID AND (CONTENT IS NOT NULL OR IMAGECONTENT IS NOT NULL)) ONELINECNT, A.UPPERITEMIDTREE, A.DOCNO, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 NOTICE, CASE WHEN ( (CASE WHEN #lang# = '1' THEN BOARDNAME WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN BOARDNAME2 WHEN #lang# = '3' THEN BOARDNAME3 WHEN #lang# = '4' THEN BOARDNAME4 WHEN #lang# = '6' THEN BOARDNAME6 ELSE BOARDNAME END) = '' OR (CASE WHEN #lang# = '1' THEN BOARDNAME WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN BOARDNAME2 WHEN #lang# = '3' THEN BOARDNAME3 WHEN #lang# = '4' THEN BOARDNAME4 WHEN #lang# = '6' THEN BOARDNAME6 ELSE BOARDNAME END) IS NULL ) THEN B.BOARDNAME ELSE (CASE WHEN #lang# = '1' THEN BOARDNAME WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN BOARDNAME2 WHEN #lang# = '3' THEN BOARDNAME3 WHEN #lang# = '4' THEN BOARDNAME4 WHEN #lang# = '6' THEN BOARDNAME6 ELSE BOARDNAME END) END BOARDNAME, A.APPRFLAG APPRFLAG, A.PUBLICFLAG FROM TBL_Board_Item A JOIN TBL_Board_BoardInfo B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.BoardID = B.BoardID LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 0 THEN 'NONE' WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 1 THEN MAX(TO_CHAR(FILENAME)) ELSE 'MANY' END AS EXT, CASE WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 0 THEN 'NONE' WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 1 THEN MAX(TO_CHAR(FILEPATH)) ELSE 'MANY' END AS FILEPATH, TENANT_ID, itemid FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_ATTACHMENTS GROUP BY ITEMID, TENANT_ID ) F ON A.ITEMID = F.ITEMID AND A.TENANT_ID = F.TENANT_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND WRITERID = #v_PUSERID# AND STARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND ENDDATE > #nowDate# AND extensionAttribute1 = '0' AND extensionAttribute2 = '1' ORDER BY A.WriteDate DESC

sqlMap.select:
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM (SELECT Row_Number() OVER ( ORDER BY A.ITEMID A.WRITERNAME A.WRITERDEPTNAME A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME A.STARTDATE A.WRITEDATE A.TITLE A.ATTACHMENTS A.DOCNO A.READCOUNT
CASE WHEN ( (CASE WHEN #lang# = '1' THEN BOARDNAME WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN BOARDNAME2 WHEN #lang# = '3' THEN BOARDNAME3 WHEN #lang# = '4' THEN BOARDNAME4 WHEN #lang# = '6' THEN BOARDNAME6 ELSE BOARDNAME END) = '' OR (CASE WHEN #lang# = '1' THEN BOARDNAME WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN BOARDNAME2 WHEN #lang# = '3' THEN BOARDNAME3 WHEN #lang# = '4' THEN BOARDNAME4 WHEN #lang# = '6' THEN BOARDNAME6 ELSE BOARDNAME END) IS NULL ) THEN B.BOARDNAME ELSE (CASE WHEN #lang# = '1' THEN BOARDNAME WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN BOARDNAME2 WHEN #lang# = '3' THEN BOARDNAME3 WHEN #lang# = '4' THEN BOARDNAME4 WHEN #lang# = '6' THEN BOARDNAME6 ELSE BOARDNAME END) END
DESC ) AS RNUM, A.BOARDID, A.ITEMID, A.WRITERID, A.WRITERNAME, A.WRITERDEPTNAME, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME, A.STARTDATE, A.WRITEDATE, A.PARENTWRITEDATE, A.IMPORTANCE, A.TITLE, A.READCOUNT, A.ATTACHMENTS, EXT, FILEPATH, A.ITEMLEVEL, A.ABSTRACT, CASE WHEN D.TOTALCOUNT IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE '1' END READFLAG, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5, A.WRITERNAME2, A.WRITERDEPTNAME2, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME2, B.ATTRIBUTEYN, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_Board_OneLineReply WHERE TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND ITEMID = A.ItemID AND (CONTENT IS NOT NULL OR IMAGECONTENT IS NOT NULL)) ONELINECNT, A.UPPERITEMIDTREE, A.DOCNO, CASE WHEN ( (CASE WHEN #lang# = '1' THEN BOARDNAME WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN BOARDNAME2 WHEN #lang# = '3' THEN BOARDNAME3 WHEN #lang# = '4' THEN BOARDNAME4 WHEN #lang# = '6' THEN BOARDNAME6 ELSE BOARDNAME END) = '' OR (CASE WHEN #lang# = '1' THEN BOARDNAME WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN BOARDNAME2 WHEN #lang# = '3' THEN BOARDNAME3 WHEN #lang# = '4' THEN BOARDNAME4 WHEN #lang# = '6' THEN BOARDNAME6 ELSE BOARDNAME END) IS NULL ) THEN B.BOARDNAME ELSE (CASE WHEN #lang# = '1' THEN BOARDNAME WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN BOARDNAME2 WHEN #lang# = '3' THEN BOARDNAME3 WHEN #lang# = '4' THEN BOARDNAME4 WHEN #lang# = '6' THEN BOARDNAME6 ELSE BOARDNAME END) END BOARDNAME, B.GUBUN AS GUBUN, '' AS NOTICE, A.APPRFLAG AS APPRFLAG, A.PUBLICFLAG FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM A INNER JOIN TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.BoardID = B.BoardID AND B.GUBUN != 9 LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT COUNT(USERID) AS TOTALCOUNT, ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_READ WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND USERID = #v_PUSERID# GROUP BY ITEMID, TENANT_ID) D ON A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID AND A.ITEMID = D.ITEMID LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 0 THEN 'NONE' WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 1 THEN MAX(TO_CHAR(FILENAME)) ELSE 'MANY' END AS EXT, CASE WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 0 THEN 'NONE' WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 1 THEN MAX(TO_CHAR(FILEPATH)) ELSE 'MANY' END AS FILEPATH, TENANT_ID, itemid FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_ATTACHMENTS GROUP BY ITEMID, TENANT_ID ) F ON A.ITEMID = F.ITEMID AND A.TENANT_ID = F.TENANT_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND (A.WRITERCOMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# OR TRIM(B.COMPANYID) = '' OR B.COMPANYID IS NULL) AND WRITERID = #v_PUSERID# AND
((A.APPRFLAG <> 'C' AND A.APPRFLAG <> 'N') OR A.APPRFLAG IS NULL) AND STARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND ENDDATE > #nowDate#) T1 WHERE RNUM <= #v_PENDROW#) T2 WHERE RNUM >= #v_PSTARTROW#

SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM (SELECT Row_Number() OVER ( ORDER BY A.ITEMID A.WRITERNAME A.WRITERDEPTNAME A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME A.STARTDATE A.WRITEDATE A.TITLE A.ATTACHMENTS A.DOCNO A.READCOUNT
CASE WHEN ( (CASE WHEN #lang# = '1' THEN BOARDNAME WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN BOARDNAME2 WHEN #lang# = '3' THEN BOARDNAME3 WHEN #lang# = '4' THEN BOARDNAME4 WHEN #lang# = '6' THEN BOARDNAME6 ELSE BOARDNAME END) = '' OR (CASE WHEN #lang# = '1' THEN BOARDNAME WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN BOARDNAME2 WHEN #lang# = '3' THEN BOARDNAME3 WHEN #lang# = '4' THEN BOARDNAME4 WHEN #lang# = '6' THEN BOARDNAME6 ELSE BOARDNAME END) IS NULL ) THEN B.BOARDNAME ELSE (CASE WHEN #lang# = '1' THEN BOARDNAME WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN BOARDNAME2 WHEN #lang# = '3' THEN BOARDNAME3 WHEN #lang# = '4' THEN BOARDNAME4 WHEN #lang# = '6' THEN BOARDNAME6 ELSE BOARDNAME END) END
DESC ) AS ROWNUM_, A.BOARDID, A.ITEMID, A.WRITERID, A.WRITERNAME, A.WRITERDEPTNAME, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME, A.STARTDATE, A.WRITEDATE, A.PARENTWRITEDATE, A.IMPORTANCE, A.TITLE, A.READCOUNT, A.ATTACHMENTS, EXT, FILEPATH, A.ITEMLEVEL, A.ABSTRACT, CASE WHEN D.TOTALCOUNT IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE '1' END READFLAG, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5, A.WRITERNAME2, A.WRITERDEPTNAME2, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME2, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_Board_OneLineReply WHERE TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND ITEMID = A.ItemID AND (CONTENT IS NOT NULL OR IMAGECONTENT IS NOT NULL)) ONELINECNT, A.UPPERITEMIDTREE, A.DOCNO, CASE WHEN ( (CASE WHEN #lang# = '1' THEN BOARDNAME WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN BOARDNAME2 WHEN #lang# = '3' THEN BOARDNAME3 WHEN #lang# = '4' THEN BOARDNAME4 WHEN #lang# = '6' THEN BOARDNAME6 ELSE BOARDNAME END) = '' OR (CASE WHEN #lang# = '1' THEN BOARDNAME WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN BOARDNAME2 WHEN #lang# = '3' THEN BOARDNAME3 WHEN #lang# = '4' THEN BOARDNAME4 WHEN #lang# = '6' THEN BOARDNAME6 ELSE BOARDNAME END) IS NULL ) THEN B.BOARDNAME ELSE (CASE WHEN #lang# = '1' THEN BOARDNAME WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN BOARDNAME2 WHEN #lang# = '3' THEN BOARDNAME3 WHEN #lang# = '4' THEN BOARDNAME4 WHEN #lang# = '6' THEN BOARDNAME6 ELSE BOARDNAME END) END BOARDNAME, B.GUBUN AS GUBUN, '' AS NOTICE, A.PUBLICFLAG FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_TEMP A INNER JOIN TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.BoardID = B.BoardID LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT COUNT(USERID) AS TOTALCOUNT, ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_READ WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND USERID = #v_PUSERID# GROUP BY ITEMID, TENANT_ID) D ON A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID AND A.ITEMID = D.ITEMID LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 0 THEN 'NONE' WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 1 THEN MAX(TO_CHAR(FILENAME)) ELSE 'MANY' END AS EXT, CASE WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 0 THEN 'NONE' WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 1 THEN MAX(TO_CHAR(FILEPATH)) ELSE 'MANY' END AS FILEPATH, TENANT_ID, itemid FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_ATTACHMENTS GROUP BY ITEMID, TENANT_ID ) F ON A.ITEMID = F.ITEMID AND A.TENANT_ID = F.TENANT_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND (A.WRITERCOMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# OR TRIM(B.COMPANYID) = '' OR B.COMPANYID IS NULL) AND WRITERID = #v_PUSERID#) T1 WHERE
ROWNUM_ <= #v_PENDROW#) T2 WHERE ROWNUM_ >= #v_PSTARTROW#

SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM (SELECT Row_Number() OVER ( ORDER BY A.ITEMID A.WRITERNAME A.WRITERDEPTNAME A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME A.STARTDATE A.WRITEDATE A.TITLE A.ATTACHMENTS A.DOCNO TO_NUMBER(A.PARENTWRITEDATE) A.READCOUNT
CASE WHEN ( (CASE WHEN #lang# = '1' THEN BOARDNAME WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN BOARDNAME2 WHEN #lang# = '3' THEN BOARDNAME3 WHEN #lang# = '4' THEN BOARDNAME4 WHEN #lang# = '6' THEN BOARDNAME6 ELSE BOARDNAME END) = '' OR (CASE WHEN #lang# = '1' THEN BOARDNAME WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN BOARDNAME2 WHEN #lang# = '3' THEN BOARDNAME3 WHEN #lang# = '4' THEN BOARDNAME4 WHEN #lang# = '6' THEN BOARDNAME6 ELSE BOARDNAME END) IS NULL ) THEN B.BOARDNAME ELSE (CASE WHEN #lang# = '1' THEN BOARDNAME WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN BOARDNAME2 WHEN #lang# = '3' THEN BOARDNAME3 WHEN #lang# = '4' THEN BOARDNAME4 WHEN #lang# = '6' THEN BOARDNAME6 ELSE BOARDNAME END) END
DESC ) AS RNUM, A.BOARDID, A.ITEMID, A.WRITERID, A.WRITERNAME, A.WRITERDEPTNAME, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME, A.STARTDATE, A.WRITEDATE, A.PARENTWRITEDATE, A.IMPORTANCE, A.TITLE, A.READCOUNT, A.ATTACHMENTS, EXT, FILEPATH, A.ITEMLEVEL, A.ABSTRACT, CASE WHEN D.TOTALCOUNT IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE '1' END READFLAG, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5, A.WRITERNAME2, A.WRITERDEPTNAME2, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME2, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_Board_OneLineReply WHERE TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND ITEMID = A.ItemID) ONELINECNT, A.UPPERITEMIDTREE, A.DOCNO, CASE WHEN ( (CASE WHEN #lang# = '1' THEN BOARDNAME WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN BOARDNAME2 WHEN #lang# = '3' THEN BOARDNAME3 WHEN #lang# = '4' THEN BOARDNAME4 WHEN #lang# = '6' THEN BOARDNAME6 ELSE BOARDNAME END) = '' OR (CASE WHEN #lang# = '1' THEN BOARDNAME WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN BOARDNAME2 WHEN #lang# = '3' THEN BOARDNAME3 WHEN #lang# = '4' THEN BOARDNAME4 WHEN #lang# = '6' THEN BOARDNAME6 ELSE BOARDNAME END) IS NULL ) THEN B.BOARDNAME ELSE (CASE WHEN #lang# = '1' THEN BOARDNAME WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN BOARDNAME2 WHEN #lang# = '3' THEN BOARDNAME3 WHEN #lang# = '4' THEN BOARDNAME4 WHEN #lang# = '6' THEN BOARDNAME6 ELSE BOARDNAME END) END BOARDNAME, B.GUBUN AS GUBUN, '' AS NOTICE, B.COMPANYID, A.PUBLICFLAG FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM A INNER JOIN TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.BoardID = B.BoardID LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT COUNT(USERID) AS TOTALCOUNT, ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_READ WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND USERID = #v_PUSERID# GROUP BY ITEMID, TENANT_ID) D ON A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID AND A.ITEMID = D.ITEMID INNER JOIN TBL_BOARD_APPRLIST APPR ON A.BOARDID = APPR.BOARDID LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 0 THEN 'NONE' WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 1 THEN MAX(TO_CHAR(FILENAME)) ELSE 'MANY' END AS EXT, CASE WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 0 THEN 'NONE' WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 1 THEN MAX(TO_CHAR(FILEPATH)) ELSE 'MANY' END AS FILEPATH, TENANT_ID, itemid FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_ATTACHMENTS GROUP BY ITEMID, TENANT_ID ) F ON A.ITEMID = F.ITEMID AND A.TENANT_ID = F.TENANT_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND (B.COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# OR TRIM(B.COMPANYID) = '' OR B.COMPANYID IS NULL) AND
STARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND ENDDATE > #nowDate# AND A.APPRFLAG = 'N' AND APPR.APPRUSERID = #v_PUSERID#) T1 WHERE RNUM <= #v_PENDROW#) T2 WHERE RNUM >= #v_PSTARTROW#

SELECT A.BOARDID , A.APPRUSERID , B.DISPLAYNAME , B.DISPLAYNAME2 , B.DESCRIPTION , B.DESCRIPTION2 FROM TBL_Board_ApprList A JOIN TBL_UserMaster B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.APPRUSERID = B.CN WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID#

SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM (SELECT Row_Number() OVER ( ORDER BY A.ITEMID A.WRITERNAME A.WRITERDEPTNAME A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME A.WRITEDATE A.TITLE A.DOCNO TO_NUMBER(A.PARENTWRITEDATE) A.READCOUNT LIKECOUNT DESC , TO_CHAR(A.UPPERITEMIDTREE) DESC ) AS RNUM, A.BOARDID, A.ITEMID, A.WRITERID, A.WRITERNAME, A.WRITERDEPTNAME, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME, A.WRITEDATE, A.TITLE, A.READCOUNT, A.WRITERNAME2, A.WRITERDEPTNAME2, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME2, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_Board_OneLineReply WHERE TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND ITEMID = A.ItemID AND (CONTENT IS NOT NULL OR IMAGECONTENT IS NOT NULL)) ONELINECNT, A.DOCNO, A.MAINCONTENT, B.FILEPATH, B.ADDTHUMBNAIL, B.THUMBNAILEXT, CASE WHEN D.TOTALCOUNT IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE '1' END READFLAG, NVL(LIKECOUNT, 0) as LIKECOUNT, NVL(DISLIKECOUNT, 0) as DISLIKECOUNT, A.WRITERDEPTID, NVL(A.WRITERNAMETYPE, '') as WRITERNAMETYPE FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM A INNER JOIN TBL_Photo_ImageItem B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.ItemID = B.ItemID LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT COUNT(USERID) AS TOTALCOUNT, ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_READ WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND USERID = #v_PUSERID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# GROUP BY ITEMID, TENANT_ID) D ON A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID AND A.ITEMID = D.ITEMID LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT COUNT(G.ITEMID) as LIKECOUNT, G.ITEMID, G.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_BOARD_LIKE G INNER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER H ON G.USERID = H.CN WHERE G.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# GROUP BY G.ITEMID, G.TENANT_ID) L ON A.TENANT_ID = L.TENANT_ID AND A.ITEMID = L.ITEMID LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT COUNT(K.ITEMID) as DISLIKECOUNT, K.ITEMID, K.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_BOARD_DISLIKE K INNER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER J ON K.USERID = J.CN WHERE K.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# GROUP BY K.ITEMID, K.TENANT_ID) M ON A.TENANT_ID = M.TENANT_ID AND A.ITEMID = M.ITEMID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND A.BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# AND B.MAIN_FLAG = 'Y'
A.APPRFLAG = 'Y'
AND STARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND ENDDATE > #nowDate# ) T1
AND STARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND ENDDATE > #nowDate# AND D.TOTALCOUNT IS NULL ) T1
WHERE RNUM <= #endRow# ) T2 WHERE RNUM >= #startRow#

SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM (SELECT distinct A.ITEMID, Row_Number() OVER ( ORDER BY A.ITEMID A.WRITERNAME A.WRITERDEPTNAME A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME A.WRITEDATE A.TITLE A.DOCNO TO_NUMBER(A.PARENTWRITEDATE) A.READCOUNT LIKECOUNT DESC , TO_CHAR(A.UPPERITEMIDTREE) DESC ) AS RNUM, A.BOARDID, A.WRITERID, A.WRITERNAME, A.WRITERDEPTNAME, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME, A.WRITEDATE, A.TITLE, A.READCOUNT, A.WRITERNAME2, A.WRITERDEPTNAME2, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME2, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_Board_OneLineReply WHERE TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND ITEMID = A.ItemID) ONELINECNT, A.DOCNO, TO_CHAR(A.MAINCONTENT) AS MAINCONTENT,
PART.FILEPATH,
B.FILEPATH,
CASE WHEN D.TOTALCOUNT IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE '1' END READFLAG, NVL(LIKECOUNT, 0) as LIKECOUNT, NVL(DISLIKECOUNT, 0) as DISLIKECOUNT FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM A INNER JOIN TBL_Photo_ImageItem B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.ItemID = B.ItemID LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT COUNT(USERID) AS TOTALCOUNT, ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_READ WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND USERID = #v_PUSERID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# GROUP BY ITEMID, TENANT_ID) D ON A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID AND A.ITEMID = D.ITEMID LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT COUNT(G.ITEMID) as LIKECOUNT, G.ITEMID, G.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_BOARD_LIKE G INNER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER H ON G.USERID = H.CN WHERE G.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# GROUP BY G.ITEMID, G.TENANT_ID) L ON A.TENANT_ID = L.TENANT_ID AND A.ITEMID = L.ITEMID LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT COUNT(K.ITEMID) as DISLIKECOUNT, K.ITEMID, K.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_BOARD_DISLIKE K INNER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER J ON K.USERID = J.CN WHERE K.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# GROUP BY K.ITEMID, K.TENANT_ID) M ON A.TENANT_ID = M.TENANT_ID AND A.ITEMID = M.ITEMID
JOIN( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT A.ITEMID, A.TENANT_ID, A.BOARDID, MAIN_FLAG, B.FILEPATH, CONTENT, FILECONTENT, MAINCONTENT, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY A.ITEMID ORDER BY CASE WHEN B.MAIN_FLAG = 'Y' THEN 1 WHEN GUID IS NOT NULL THEN GUID + 1 ELSE 100 END ) AS SN FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_ATTACHMENTS BIT RIGHT OUTER JOIN TBL_BOARD_ITEM A ON BIT.ITEMID = A.ITEMID AND BIT.TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_PHOTO_IMAGEITEM B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.ITEMID = B.ITEMID WHERE (UPPER(TITLE) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_TITLE_AND_CONTENT# || '%') OR UPPER(CONTENT) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_TITLE_AND_CONTENT# || '%') OR UPPER(FILECONTENT) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_TITLE_AND_CONTENT# || '%') OR UPPER(A.MAINCONTENT) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_TITLE_AND_CONTENT# || '%')) )A WHERE SN = 1 ) PART ON PART.ITEMID = A.ITEMID AND PART.TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND B.MAIN_FLAG = PART.MAIN_FLAG
WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND
(A.BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# OR A.BOARDID IN (SELECT BOARDID FROM TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND PARENTBOARDID = #v_PBOARDID#))
A.BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID#
AND B.MAIN_FLAG = 'Y' AND STARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND ENDDATE > #nowDate#
AND A.APPRFLAG = 'Y'
AND UPPER(TITLE) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_TITLE# || '%')
AND UPPER(CONTENT) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_CONTENT# || '%')
AND (UPPER(A.WRITERNAME) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_WRITERNAME# || '%') OR UPPER(A.WRITERNAME2) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_WRITERNAME# || '%'))
AND A.WRITEDATE > #v_SEARCH_STARTDATE#
AND A.WRITEDATE < #v_SEARCH_ENDDATE#
AND UPPER(ABSTRACT) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_ABSTRACT# || '%')
AND (UPPER(TOPWRITERID) = UPPER(#v_SEARCH_TOPWRITERID#) OR EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = '1')
AND A.ITEMID in ( SELECT DISTINCT ITEMID FROM tbl_board_boarditem_keyword BK INNER JOIN TBL_BOARD_KEYWORD K ON BK.KEYWORDID = K.KEYWORDID AND BK.TENANT_ID = K.TENANT_ID WHERE UPPER(K.KEYWORDNAME) like UPPER(CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #v_KEYWORD#), '%')) AND BK.BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# AND BK.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# )
) T1 WHERE RNUM <= #v_PENDROW#) T2 WHERE RNUM >= #v_PSTARTROW#

SELECT A.BOARDID , A.ITEMID , A.WRITERID , A.WRITERNAME , A.WRITERDEPTNAME , A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME , A.STARTDATE , A.WRITEDATE , A.PARENTWRITEDATE , A.IMPORTANCE , A.TITLE , A.READCOUNT , A.ATTACHMENTS , A.ITEMLEVEL , A.ABSTRACT , '0' READFLAG , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 , A.WRITERNAME2 , A.WRITERDEPTNAME2 , A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME2 , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_Board_OneLineReply WHERE TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND ITEMID = A.ItemID) ONELINECNT, A.UPPERITEMIDTREE , A.DOCNO , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 NOTICE FROM TBL_Board_Item A WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND BOARDID = #boardID# AND STARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND NTENDDATE > #nowDate# AND extensionAttribute1 = '0' AND extensionAttribute2 = '1' AND ( (A.APPRFLAG <> 'C' AND A.APPRFLAG <> 'N') OR A.APPRFLAG IS NULL ) ORDER BY NOTINO ASC, TO_NUMBER(A.ParentWriteDate) DESC, A.WriteDate DESC

SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM (SELECT Row_Number() OVER ( ORDER BY A.ITEMID A.WRITERNAME A.WRITERDEPTNAME A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME A.STARTDATE A.WRITEDATE A.TITLE A.ATTACHMENTS A.DOCNO TO_NUMBER(A.PARENTWRITEDATE) A.READCOUNT LIKECOUNT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6 EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8 EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10
CASE WHEN ( (CASE WHEN #lang# = '1' THEN I.BOARDNAME WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN I.BOARDNAME2 WHEN #lang# = '3' THEN I.BOARDNAME3 WHEN #lang# = '4' THEN I.BOARDNAME4 WHEN #lang# = '6' THEN I.BOARDNAME6 ELSE I.BOARDNAME END) = '' OR (CASE WHEN #lang# = '1' THEN I.BOARDNAME WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN I.BOARDNAME2 WHEN #lang# = '3' THEN I.BOARDNAME3 WHEN #lang# = '4' THEN I.BOARDNAME4 WHEN #lang# = '6' THEN I.BOARDNAME6 ELSE I.BOARDNAME END) IS NULL ) THEN I.BOARDNAME ELSE (CASE WHEN #lang# = '1' THEN I.BOARDNAME WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN I.BOARDNAME2 WHEN #lang# = '3' THEN I.BOARDNAME3 WHEN #lang# = '4' THEN I.BOARDNAME4 WHEN #lang# = '6' THEN I.BOARDNAME6 ELSE I.BOARDNAME END) END
DESC , TO_CHAR(A.UPPERITEMIDTREE) DESC ) AS ROWNUM_, A.BOARDID, A.ITEMID, A.WRITERID, A.WRITERNAME, A.WRITERDEPTNAME, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME, A.STARTDATE, A.WRITEDATE, A.PARENTWRITEDATE, A.IMPORTANCE, A.TITLE, A.READCOUNT, A.ATTACHMENTS, EXT, FILEPATH, A.ITEMLEVEL, A.ABSTRACT, CASE WHEN D.TOTALCOUNT IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE '1' END READFLAG, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5, A.WRITERNAME2, A.WRITERDEPTNAME2, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME2, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_Board_OneLineReply WHERE TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND ITEMID = A.ItemID) ONELINECNT, A.UPPERITEMIDTREE, A.DOCNO, '' AS NOTICE, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10, CASE WHEN ( (CASE WHEN #lang# = '1' THEN I.BOARDNAME WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN I.BOARDNAME2 WHEN #lang# = '3' THEN I.BOARDNAME3 WHEN #lang# = '4' THEN I.BOARDNAME4 WHEN #lang# = '6' THEN I.BOARDNAME6 ELSE I.BOARDNAME END) = '' OR (CASE WHEN #lang# = '1' THEN I.BOARDNAME WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN I.BOARDNAME2 WHEN #lang# = '3' THEN I.BOARDNAME3 WHEN #lang# = '4' THEN I.BOARDNAME4 WHEN #lang# = '6' THEN I.BOARDNAME6 ELSE I.BOARDNAME END) IS NULL ) THEN I.BOARDNAME ELSE (CASE WHEN #lang# = '1' THEN I.BOARDNAME WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN I.BOARDNAME2 WHEN #lang# = '3' THEN I.BOARDNAME3 WHEN #lang# = '4' THEN I.BOARDNAME4 WHEN #lang# = '6' THEN I.BOARDNAME6 ELSE I.BOARDNAME END) END BOARDNAME, I.GUBUN, NVL(LIKECOUNT, 0) as LIKECOUNT, NVL(DISLIKECOUNT, 0) as DISLIKECOUNT FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM A LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT COUNT(USERID) AS TOTALCOUNT, ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_READ WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND USERID = #v_PUSERID# GROUP BY ITEMID, TENANT_ID) D ON A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID AND A.ITEMID = D.ITEMID LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT COUNT(G.ITEMID) as LIKECOUNT, G.ITEMID, G.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_BOARD_LIKE G INNER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER H ON G.USERID = H.CN WHERE G.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# GROUP BY G.ITEMID, G.TENANT_ID) L ON A.TENANT_ID = L.TENANT_ID AND A.ITEMID = L.ITEMID LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT COUNT(K.ITEMID) as DISLIKECOUNT, K.ITEMID, K.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_BOARD_DISLIKE K INNER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER J ON K.USERID = J.CN WHERE K.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# GROUP BY K.ITEMID, K.TENANT_ID) M ON A.TENANT_ID = M.TENANT_ID AND A.ITEMID = M.ITEMID INNER JOIN TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO I ON A.TENANT_ID = I.TENANT_ID AND A.BOARDID = I.BOARDID LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 0 THEN 'NONE' WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 1 THEN MAX(TO_CHAR(FILENAME)) ELSE 'MANY' END AS EXT, CASE WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 0 THEN 'NONE' WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 1 THEN MAX(TO_CHAR(FILEPATH)) ELSE 'MANY' END AS FILEPATH, TENANT_ID, itemid FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_ATTACHMENTS GROUP BY ITEMID, TENANT_ID ) F ON A.ITEMID = F.ITEMID AND A.TENANT_ID = F.TENANT_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER( PARTITION BY PARENTITEMID ORDER BY VERSION DESC ) RN, ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_BOARD_MODIFYHISTORY ) M1 ON A.ITEMID = M1.ITEMID AND A.TENANT_ID = M1.TENANT_ID
LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT ITEMID, BOARDID, TO_CHAR(FILECONTENT) AS FC, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_PHOTO_IMAGEITEM ) PI ON PI.TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND PI.ITEMID = A.ITEMID AND PI.BOARDID = A.BOARDID
WHERE
(A.BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# OR A.BOARDID IN (SELECT BOARDID FROM TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND PARENTBOARDID = #v_PBOARDID#))
A.BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID#
AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND STARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND ENDDATE > #nowDate# AND ( (A.APPRFLAG <> 'C' AND A.APPRFLAG <> 'N') OR A.APPRFLAG IS NULL )
M1.RN = 1
(M1.ITEMID IS NULL OR M1.RN = 1)
AND UPPER(TITLE) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_TITLE# || '%')
AND UPPER(CONTENT) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_CONTENT# || '%')
AND (UPPER(A.WRITERNAME) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_WRITERNAME# || '%') OR UPPER(A.WRITERNAME2) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_WRITERNAME# || '%'))
AND A.WRITEDATE > #v_SEARCH_STARTDATE#
AND A.WRITEDATE < #v_SEARCH_ENDDATE#
AND UPPER(ABSTRACT) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_ABSTRACT# || '%')
AND (UPPER(TOPWRITERID) = UPPER(#v_SEARCH_TOPWRITERID#) OR EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = '1')
AND (UPPER(TITLE) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_TITLE_AND_CONTENT# || '%') OR UPPER(CONTENT) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_TITLE_AND_CONTENT# || '%')
OR UPPER(FC) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_TITLE_AND_CONTENT# || '%') OR UPPER(A.MAINCONTENT) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_TITLE_AND_CONTENT# || '%')
)
AND A.ITEMID in ( SELECT DISTINCT ITEMID FROM tbl_board_boarditem_keyword BK INNER JOIN TBL_BOARD_KEYWORD K ON BK.KEYWORDID = K.KEYWORDID AND BK.TENANT_ID = K.TENANT_ID WHERE UPPER(K.KEYWORDNAME) like UPPER(CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #v_KEYWORD#), '%')) AND BK.BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# AND BK.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# )
) T1
WHERE ROWNUM_ <= #v_PENDROW#) T2 WHERE ROWNUM_ >= #v_PSTARTROW#

SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM (SELECT Row_Number() OVER ( ORDER BY A.ITEMID A.WRITERNAME A.WRITERDEPTNAME A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME A.STARTDATE A.WRITEDATE A.TITLE A.ATTACHMENTS A.DOCNO TO_NUMBER(A.PARENTWRITEDATE) A.READCOUNT LIKECOUNT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6 EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8 EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10
CASE WHEN ( (CASE WHEN #lang# = '1' THEN I.BOARDNAME WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN I.BOARDNAME2 WHEN #lang# = '3' THEN I.BOARDNAME3 WHEN #lang# = '4' THEN I.BOARDNAME4 WHEN #lang# = '6' THEN I.BOARDNAME6 ELSE I.BOARDNAME END) = '' OR (CASE WHEN #lang# = '1' THEN I.BOARDNAME WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN I.BOARDNAME2 WHEN #lang# = '3' THEN I.BOARDNAME3 WHEN #lang# = '4' THEN I.BOARDNAME4 WHEN #lang# = '6' THEN I.BOARDNAME6 ELSE I.BOARDNAME END) IS NULL ) THEN I.BOARDNAME ELSE (CASE WHEN #lang# = '1' THEN I.BOARDNAME WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN I.BOARDNAME2 WHEN #lang# = '3' THEN I.BOARDNAME3 WHEN #lang# = '4' THEN I.BOARDNAME4 WHEN #lang# = '6' THEN I.BOARDNAME6 ELSE I.BOARDNAME END) END
DESC ) AS RNUM, A.BOARDID, A.ITEMID, A.WRITERID, A.WRITERNAME, A.WRITERDEPTNAME, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME, A.STARTDATE, A.WRITEDATE, A.PARENTWRITEDATE, A.IMPORTANCE, A.TITLE, A.READCOUNT, A.ATTACHMENTS, EXT, FILEPATH, A.ITEMLEVEL, A.ABSTRACT, CASE WHEN D.TOTALCOUNT IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE '1' END READFLAG, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5, A.WRITERNAME2, A.WRITERDEPTNAME2, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME2, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_Board_OneLineReply WHERE TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND ITEMID = A.ItemID) ONELINECNT, A.UPPERITEMIDTREE, A.DOCNO, '' AS NOTICE, CASE WHEN ( (CASE WHEN #lang# = '1' THEN I.BOARDNAME WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN I.BOARDNAME2 WHEN #lang# = '3' THEN I.BOARDNAME3 WHEN #lang# = '4' THEN I.BOARDNAME4 WHEN #lang# = '6' THEN I.BOARDNAME6 ELSE I.BOARDNAME END) = '' OR (CASE WHEN #lang# = '1' THEN I.BOARDNAME WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN I.BOARDNAME2 WHEN #lang# = '3' THEN I.BOARDNAME3 WHEN #lang# = '4' THEN I.BOARDNAME4 WHEN #lang# = '6' THEN I.BOARDNAME6 ELSE I.BOARDNAME END) IS NULL ) THEN I.BOARDNAME ELSE (CASE WHEN #lang# = '1' THEN I.BOARDNAME WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN I.BOARDNAME2 WHEN #lang# = '3' THEN I.BOARDNAME3 WHEN #lang# = '4' THEN I.BOARDNAME4 WHEN #lang# = '6' THEN I.BOARDNAME6 ELSE I.BOARDNAME END) END BOARDNAME, I.GUBUN AS GUBUN FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM A LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT COUNT(USERID) AS TOTALCOUNT, ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_READ WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND USERID = #v_PUSERID# GROUP BY ITEMID, TENANT_ID) D ON A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID AND A.ITEMID = D.ITEMID INNER JOIN TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO I ON A.TENANT_ID = I.TENANT_ID AND A.BOARDID = I.BOARDID LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 0 THEN 'NONE' WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 1 THEN MAX(TO_CHAR(FILENAME)) ELSE 'MANY' END AS EXT, CASE WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 0 THEN 'NONE' WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 1 THEN MAX(TO_CHAR(FILEPATH)) ELSE 'MANY' END AS FILEPATH, TENANT_ID, itemid FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_ATTACHMENTS GROUP BY ITEMID, TENANT_ID ) F ON A.ITEMID = F.ITEMID AND A.TENANT_ID = F.TENANT_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND (A.WritercompanyID = #v_COMPANYID# OR TRIM(I.COMPANYID) = '' OR I.COMPANYID IS NULL) AND A.WRITERID = #v_PUSERID#
AND STARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND ENDDATE > #nowDate# AND ( (A.APPRFLAG <> 'C' AND A.APPRFLAG <> 'N') OR A.APPRFLAG IS NULL )
AND UPPER(TITLE) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_TITLE# || '%')
AND UPPER(CONTENT) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_CONTENT# || '%')
AND (UPPER(A.WRITERNAME) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_WRITERNAME# || '%') OR UPPER(A.WRITERNAME2) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_WRITERNAME# || '%'))
AND A.WRITEDATE > #v_SEARCH_STARTDATE#
AND A.WRITEDATE < #v_SEARCH_ENDDATE#
AND UPPER(ABSTRACT) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_ABSTRACT# || '%')
AND (UPPER(TOPWRITERID) = UPPER(#v_SEARCH_TOPWRITERID#) OR EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = '1')
AND (UPPER(TITLE) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_TITLE_AND_CONTENT# || '%') OR UPPER(CONTENT) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_TITLE_AND_CONTENT# || '%'))
AND ( I.USEKEYWORD = 'Y' AND A.ITEMID in ( SELECT DISTINCT ITEMID FROM tbl_board_boarditem_keyword BK INNER JOIN TBL_BOARD_KEYWORD K ON BK.KEYWORDID = K.KEYWORDID AND BK.TENANT_ID = K.TENANT_ID WHERE UPPER(K.KEYWORDNAME) like UPPER(CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #v_KEYWORD#), '%')) AND BK.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ) )
) T1
WHERE RNUM <= #v_PENDROW#) T2 WHERE RNUM >= #v_PSTARTROW#

SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM (SELECT Row_Number() OVER ( ORDER BY A.ITEMID A.WRITERNAME A.WRITERDEPTNAME A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME A.STARTDATE A.WRITEDATE A.TITLE A.ATTACHMENTS A.DOCNO TO_NUMBER(A.PARENTWRITEDATE) A.READCOUNT
CASE WHEN ( (CASE WHEN #lang# = '1' THEN I.BOARDNAME WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN I.BOARDNAME2 WHEN #lang# = '3' THEN I.BOARDNAME3 WHEN #lang# = '4' THEN I.BOARDNAME4 WHEN #lang# = '6' THEN I.BOARDNAME6 ELSE I.BOARDNAME END) = '' OR (CASE WHEN #lang# = '1' THEN I.BOARDNAME WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN I.BOARDNAME2 WHEN #lang# = '3' THEN I.BOARDNAME3 WHEN #lang# = '4' THEN I.BOARDNAME4 WHEN #lang# = '6' THEN I.BOARDNAME6 ELSE I.BOARDNAME END) IS NULL ) THEN I.BOARDNAME ELSE (CASE WHEN #lang# = '1' THEN I.BOARDNAME WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN I.BOARDNAME2 WHEN #lang# = '3' THEN I.BOARDNAME3 WHEN #lang# = '4' THEN I.BOARDNAME4 WHEN #lang# = '6' THEN I.BOARDNAME6 ELSE I.BOARDNAME END) END
DESC ) AS ROWNUM_, A.BOARDID, A.ITEMID, A.WRITERID, A.WRITERNAME, A.WRITERDEPTNAME, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME, A.STARTDATE, A.WRITEDATE, A.PARENTWRITEDATE, A.IMPORTANCE, A.TITLE, A.READCOUNT, A.ATTACHMENTS, EXT, FILEPATH, A.ITEMLEVEL, A.ABSTRACT, CASE WHEN D.TOTALCOUNT IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE '1' END READFLAG, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5, A.WRITERNAME2, A.WRITERDEPTNAME2, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME2, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_Board_OneLineReply WHERE TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND ITEMID = A.ItemID) ONELINECNT, A.UPPERITEMIDTREE, A.DOCNO, '' AS NOTICE, CASE WHEN ( (CASE WHEN #lang# = '1' THEN I.BOARDNAME WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN I.BOARDNAME2 WHEN #lang# = '3' THEN I.BOARDNAME3 WHEN #lang# = '4' THEN I.BOARDNAME4 WHEN #lang# = '6' THEN I.BOARDNAME6 ELSE I.BOARDNAME END) = '' OR (CASE WHEN #lang# = '1' THEN I.BOARDNAME WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN I.BOARDNAME2 WHEN #lang# = '3' THEN I.BOARDNAME3 WHEN #lang# = '4' THEN I.BOARDNAME4 WHEN #lang# = '6' THEN I.BOARDNAME6 ELSE I.BOARDNAME END) IS NULL ) THEN I.BOARDNAME ELSE (CASE WHEN #lang# = '1' THEN I.BOARDNAME WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN I.BOARDNAME2 WHEN #lang# = '3' THEN I.BOARDNAME3 WHEN #lang# = '4' THEN I.BOARDNAME4 WHEN #lang# = '6' THEN I.BOARDNAME6 ELSE I.BOARDNAME END) END BOARDNAME, I.GUBUN AS GUBUN FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_TEMP A LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT COUNT(USERID) AS TOTALCOUNT, ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_READ WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND USERID = #v_PUSERID# GROUP BY ITEMID, TENANT_ID) D ON A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID AND A.ITEMID = D.ITEMID INNER JOIN TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO I ON A.TENANT_ID = I.TENANT_ID AND A.BOARDID = I.BOARDID LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 0 THEN 'NONE' WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 1 THEN MAX(TO_CHAR(FILENAME)) ELSE 'MANY' END AS EXT, CASE WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 0 THEN 'NONE' WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 1 THEN MAX(TO_CHAR(FILEPATH)) ELSE 'MANY' END AS FILEPATH, TENANT_ID, itemid FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_ATTACHMENTS GROUP BY ITEMID, TENANT_ID ) F ON A.ITEMID = F.ITEMID AND A.TENANT_ID = F.TENANT_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND (A.WritercompanyID = #v_COMPANYID# OR TRIM(I.COMPANYID) = '' OR I.COMPANYID IS NULL) AND A.WRITERID = #v_PUSERID#
AND UPPER(TITLE) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_TITLE# || '%')
AND UPPER(CONTENT) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_CONTENT# || '%')
AND (UPPER(A.WRITERNAME) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_WRITERNAME# || '%') OR UPPER(A.WRITERNAME2) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_WRITERNAME# || '%'))
AND A.WRITEDATE > #v_SEARCH_STARTDATE#
AND A.WRITEDATE < #v_SEARCH_ENDDATE#
AND UPPER(ABSTRACT) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_ABSTRACT# || '%')
AND (UPPER(TOPWRITERID) = UPPER(#v_SEARCH_TOPWRITERID#) OR EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = '1')
AND (UPPER(TITLE) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_TITLE_AND_CONTENT# || '%') OR UPPER(CONTENT) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_TITLE_AND_CONTENT# || '%'))
AND ( I.USEKEYWORD = 'Y' AND A.ITEMID in ( SELECT DISTINCT ITEMID FROM tbl_board_boarditem_keyword BK INNER JOIN TBL_BOARD_KEYWORD K ON BK.KEYWORDID = K.KEYWORDID AND BK.TENANT_ID = K.TENANT_ID WHERE UPPER(K.KEYWORDNAME) like UPPER(CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #v_KEYWORD#), '%')) AND BK.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ) )
) T1
WHERE ROWNUM_ <= #v_PENDROW#) T2 WHERE ROWNUM_ >= #v_PSTARTROW#

SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM (SELECT Row_Number() OVER ( ORDER BY A.ITEMID A.WRITERNAME A.WRITERDEPTNAME A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME A.STARTDATE A.WRITEDATE A.TITLE A.ATTACHMENTS A.DOCNO A.READCOUNT
CASE WHEN ( (CASE WHEN #lang# = '1' THEN BOARDNAME WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN BOARDNAME2 WHEN #lang# = '3' THEN BOARDNAME3 WHEN #lang# = '4' THEN BOARDNAME4 WHEN #lang# = '6' THEN BOARDNAME6 ELSE BOARDNAME END) = '' OR (CASE WHEN #lang# = '1' THEN BOARDNAME WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN BOARDNAME2 WHEN #lang# = '3' THEN BOARDNAME3 WHEN #lang# = '4' THEN BOARDNAME4 WHEN #lang# = '6' THEN BOARDNAME6 ELSE BOARDNAME END) IS NULL ) THEN B.BOARDNAME ELSE (CASE WHEN #lang# = '1' THEN BOARDNAME WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN BOARDNAME2 WHEN #lang# = '3' THEN BOARDNAME3 WHEN #lang# = '4' THEN BOARDNAME4 WHEN #lang# = '6' THEN BOARDNAME6 ELSE BOARDNAME END) END
DESC ) AS RNUM, A.BOARDID, A.ITEMID, A.WRITERID, A.WRITERNAME, A.WRITERDEPTNAME, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME, A.STARTDATE, A.WRITEDATE, A.PARENTWRITEDATE, A.IMPORTANCE, A.TITLE, A.READCOUNT, A.ATTACHMENTS, EXT, FILEPATH, A.ITEMLEVEL, A.ABSTRACT, CASE WHEN D.TOTALCOUNT IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE '1' END READFLAG, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5, A.WRITERNAME2, A.WRITERDEPTNAME2, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME2, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_Board_OneLineReply WHERE TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND ITEMID = A.ItemID) ONELINECNT, A.UPPERITEMIDTREE, A.DOCNO, CASE WHEN ( (CASE WHEN #lang# = '1' THEN BOARDNAME WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN BOARDNAME2 WHEN #lang# = '3' THEN BOARDNAME3 WHEN #lang# = '4' THEN BOARDNAME4 WHEN #lang# = '6' THEN BOARDNAME6 ELSE BOARDNAME END) = '' OR (CASE WHEN #lang# = '1' THEN BOARDNAME WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN BOARDNAME2 WHEN #lang# = '3' THEN BOARDNAME3 WHEN #lang# = '4' THEN BOARDNAME4 WHEN #lang# = '6' THEN BOARDNAME6 ELSE BOARDNAME END) IS NULL ) THEN B.BOARDNAME ELSE (CASE WHEN #lang# = '1' THEN BOARDNAME WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN BOARDNAME2 WHEN #lang# = '3' THEN BOARDNAME3 WHEN #lang# = '4' THEN BOARDNAME4 WHEN #lang# = '6' THEN BOARDNAME6 ELSE BOARDNAME END) END BOARDNAME, B.GUBUN AS GUBUN, '' AS NOTICE FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM A INNER JOIN TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.BoardID = B.BoardID LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT COUNT(USERID) AS TOTALCOUNT, ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_READ WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND USERID = #v_PUSERID# GROUP BY ITEMID, TENANT_ID) D ON A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID AND A.ITEMID = D.ITEMID INNER JOIN TBL_BOARD_APPRLIST APPR ON A.BOARDID = APPR.BOARDID LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 0 THEN 'NONE' WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 1 THEN MAX(TO_CHAR(FILENAME)) ELSE 'MANY' END AS EXT, CASE WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 0 THEN 'NONE' WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 1 THEN MAX(TO_CHAR(FILEPATH)) ELSE 'MANY' END AS FILEPATH, TENANT_ID, itemid FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_ATTACHMENTS GROUP BY ITEMID, TENANT_ID ) F ON A.ITEMID = F.ITEMID AND A.TENANT_ID = F.TENANT_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND (A.WRITERCOMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# OR TRIM(B.COMPANYID) = '' OR B.COMPANYID IS NULL)
AND STARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND ENDDATE > #nowDate# AND A.APPRFLAG = 'N' AND APPR.APPRUSERID = #v_PUSERID#
AND UPPER(TITLE) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_TITLE# || '%')
AND UPPER(CONTENT) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_CONTENT# || '%')
AND (UPPER(A.WRITERNAME) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_WRITERNAME# || '%') OR UPPER(A.WRITERNAME2) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_WRITERNAME# || '%'))
AND A.WRITEDATE > #v_SEARCH_STARTDATE#
AND A.WRITEDATE < #v_SEARCH_ENDDATE#
AND UPPER(ABSTRACT) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_ABSTRACT# || '%')
AND (UPPER(TOPWRITERID) = UPPER(#v_SEARCH_TOPWRITERID#) OR EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = '1')
AND (UPPER(TITLE) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_TITLE_AND_CONTENT# || '%') OR UPPER(CONTENT) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_TITLE_AND_CONTENT# || '%'))
AND ( B.USEKEYWORD = 'Y' AND A.ITEMID in ( SELECT DISTINCT ITEMID FROM tbl_board_boarditem_keyword BK INNER JOIN TBL_BOARD_KEYWORD K ON BK.KEYWORDID = K.KEYWORDID AND BK.TENANT_ID = K.TENANT_ID WHERE UPPER(K.KEYWORDNAME) like UPPER(CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #v_KEYWORD#), '%')) AND BK.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ) )
) T1
WHERE RNUM <= #v_PENDROW#) T2 WHERE RNUM >= #v_PSTARTROW#
SELECT FILEPATH FROM TBL_Board_Item_Attachments WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ITEMID = #itemID# ORDER BY GUID

select.isNotEqual: SELECT COUNT(REPLYID) FROM TBL_Board_OneLineReply WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND REPLYID = #v_REPLYID# AND USERID = #v_USERINFO_USERID#
select.isEqual: SELECT COUNT(REPLYID) FROM TBL_Board_OneLineReply WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND REPLYID = #v_REPLYID#

sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_Board_OneLineReply WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND REPLYID = #v_REPLYID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT A.ITEMID , A.WRITERID , CASE WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN A.WRITERNAME2 ELSE A.WRITERNAME END AS WRITERNAME, WRITERDEPTID, CASE WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN A.WRITERDEPTNAME2 ELSE A.WRITERDEPTNAME END AS WRITERDEPTNAME, WRITERCOMPANYID, CASE WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME2 ELSE A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME END AS WRITERCOMPANYNAME, A.WRITEDATE , A.PARENTWRITEDATE , A.IMPORTANCE , A.TITLE , A.CONTENTLOCATION , A.STARTDATE , A.ENDDATE , A.ABSTRACT , A.ATTACHMENTS , A.UPPERITEMIDTREE , A.ITEMLEVEL , A.COPIEDITEM , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 , CASE WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE32 ELSE A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 END AS EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 , A.MAINCONTENT , A.APPRFLAG , B.GUBUN , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 , A.BOARDID, A.DOCNO, A.NTSTARTDATE, A.NTENDDATE, (SELECT extensionattribute2 FROM TBL_USERMASTER F WHERE A.WRITERID = F.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = F.TENANT_ID) AS USERIMAGEFILE, (SELECT NVL(COUNT(*), 0) FROM TBL_Board_Like G INNER JOIN TBL_usermaster H ON G.USERID = H.CN WHERE G.TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND G.ITEMID = A.ItemID) as LIKECOUNT, (SELECT NVL(COUNT(*), 0) FROM TBL_Board_DisLike K INNER JOIN TBL_usermaster J ON K.USERID = J.CN WHERE K.TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND K.ITEMID = A.ItemID) as DISLIKECOUNT, B.ONELINEREPLY, A.PUBLICFLAG AS PUBLICFLAG, CASE WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN C.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE C.DISPLAYNAME END AS UPDATERNAME, A.UPDATEDATE, A.WRITERNAMETYPE, A.TOPWRITERID FROM TBL_Board_Item A JOIN TBL_Board_BoardInfo B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.BoardID = B.BoardID LEFT JOIN TBL_USERMASTER C ON A.updaterID = C.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND A.ItemID = #v_pItemID#

SELECT ITEMID , WRITERID , WRITERDEPTID, CASE WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN WRITERNAME2 ELSE WRITERNAME END AS WRITERNAME, CASE WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN WRITERDEPTNAME2 ELSE WRITERDEPTNAME END AS WRITERDEPTNAME, WRITERCOMPANYID, CASE WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN WRITERCOMPANYNAME2 ELSE WRITERCOMPANYNAME END AS WRITERCOMPANYNAME, WRITEDATE , PARENTWRITEDATE , IMPORTANCE , TITLE , CONTENTLOCATION , STARTDATE , ENDDATE , ABSTRACT , ATTACHMENTS , UPPERITEMIDTREE , ITEMLEVEL , COPIEDITEM , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 , CASE WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE32 ELSE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 END AS EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 , MAINCONTENT , B.GUBUN , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10, DOCNO, NTSTARTDATE, NTENDDATE, (SELECT extensionattribute2 FROM TBL_USERMASTER F WHERE A.WRITERID = F.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = F.TENANT_ID) AS USERIMAGEFILE, CASE WHEN STARTDATE < #nowDate# THEN 'false' ELSE 'true' END AS ISRESERVED, A.PUBLICFLAG AS PUBLICFLAG, A.WRITERNAMETYPE FROM TBL_Board_Item_temp A JOIN TBL_Board_BoardInfo B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.BoardID = B.BoardID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ItemID = #v_pItemID#

SELECT COUNT(A.ITEMID) CNT FROM TBL_Board_Item A JOIN ( SELECT BOARDID FROM TBL_Board_MyBoards WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND (COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# OR COMPANYID = '*') AND UserID = #v_pUserID# ) B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.BoardID = B.boardid JOIN TBL_Board_BoardInfo P ON P.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND P.BoardID = B.boardid WHERE ( NOT EXISTS ( SELECT USERID FROM TBL_Board_Item_Read WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND userid = #v_pUserID# AND itemid = A.itemid AND ReadDate > TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#nowDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') - 5 ) ) ) AND A.StartDate < #nowDate# AND A.StartDate > TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#nowDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') - 5 ) AND A.EndDate > #nowDate# AND ( A.APPRFLAG = 'Y' OR A.APPRFLAG IS NULL )
SELECT DISTINCT B.BOARDID FROM TBL_Board_ApprList A JOIN TBL_Board_Item B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.BOARDID = B.BOARDID WHERE B.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND B.BOARDID = #boardId#

select.isEqual:
SELECT COUNT(ITEMID) TOTALCOUNT FROM TBL_Board_Item WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# AND STARTDATE < #nowDate# AND ENDDATE > #nowDate#
AND (TOPWRITERID = #v_PUSERID# OR WRITERID = #v_PUSERID# OR EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = '1' )

SELECT COUNT(A.ITEMID) TOTALCOUNT FROM TBL_Board_Item A LEFT JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(USERID) TOTALCOUNT, ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_Board_Item_Read WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND USERID = #v_PUSERID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# GROUP BY ITEMID, TENANT_ID ) D ON A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID AND A.ItemID = D.ITEMID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# AND STARTDATE < #nowDate# AND ENDDATE > #nowDate# AND D.TOTALCOUNT IS NULL
AND (TOPWRITERID = #v_PUSERID# OR WRITERID = #v_PUSERID# OR EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = '1' )

SELECT COUNT(ITEMID) TOTALCOUNT FROM TBL_Board_Item WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# AND STARTDATE < #nowDate# AND ENDDATE < #nowDate#
AND (TOPWRITERID = #v_PUSERID# OR WRITERID = #v_PUSERID# OR EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = '1' )
SELECT COUNT(BOARDID) CNT FROM TBL_Board_BoardInfo WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# AND FORMFLAG = 'Y' AND FORMLOCATION IS NOT NULL
select.isNotEqual: SELECT COUNT(BOARDID) CNT FROM TBL_Board_BoardInfo WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# AND FORMLOCATION IS NOT NULL

SELECT COUNT(ItemID) FROM TBL_Board_Item WHERE tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND (APPRFLAG IS NULL OR APPRFLAG = 'Y')
UpperItemIDTree LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_pItemID#, '%') AND ItemID <> #v_pItemID#
UpperItemIDTree LIKE CONCAT('%', #parentItemId#, '%') AND ITEMLEVEL > (SELECT ITEMLEVEL FROM TBL_Board_Item WHERE ITEMID = #v_pItemID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#)

SELECT COUNT(A.ITEMID) TOTALCOUNT FROM TBL_Board_Item A LEFT JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(USERID) TOTALCOUNT , ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_Board_Item_Read WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND USERID = #userId# AND BOARDID = #boardId# GROUP BY ITEMID, TENANT_ID ) D ON A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID AND A.ItemID = D.ITEMID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND BOARDID = #boardId# AND APPRFLAG = 'Y' AND STARTDATE < #nowDate# AND ENDDATE > #nowDate# AND D.TOTALCOUNT IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(ITEMID) TOTALCOUNT FROM TBL_Board_Item WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND BOARDID = #boardId# AND APPRFLAG = 'Y' AND STARTDATE < #nowDate# AND ENDDATE < #nowDate#

STARTDATE < #nowDate# AND ENDDATE > #nowDate#
M1.RN = 1
(M1.ITEMID IS NULL OR M1.RN = 1)

SELECT COUNT(A.ITEMID) TOTALCOUNT FROM TBL_Board_Item A LEFT JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(USERID) TOTALCOUNT , ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_Board_Item_Read WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND USERID = #userId# AND BOARDID = #boardId# GROUP BY ITEMID, TENANT_ID ) D ON A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID AND A.ItemID = D.ITEMID
LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER( PARTITION BY PARENTITEMID ORDER BY VERSION DESC ) RN, ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_BOARD_MODIFYHISTORY ) M1 ON A.ITEMID = M1.ITEMID AND A.TENANT_ID = M1.TENANT_ID
WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND BOARDID = #boardId# AND STARTDATE < #nowDate# AND ENDDATE > #nowDate# AND D.TOTALCOUNT IS NULL
M1.RN = 1
(M1.ITEMID IS NULL OR M1.RN = 1)

SELECT COUNT(A.ITEMID) TOTALCOUNT FROM TBL_Board_Item A
LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER( PARTITION BY PARENTITEMID ORDER BY VERSION DESC ) RN, ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_BOARD_MODIFYHISTORY ) M1 ON A.ITEMID = M1.ITEMID AND A.TENANT_ID = M1.TENANT_ID
WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.BOARDID = #boardId# AND STARTDATE < #nowDate# AND ENDDATE < #nowDate#
M1.RN = 1
(M1.ITEMID IS NULL OR M1.RN = 1)
