sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(ITEMID) FROM TBL_Board_Item A INNER JOIN TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.BoardID = B.BoardID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND (WRITERCOMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# OR TRIM(B.COMPANYID) = '' OR B.COMPANYID IS NULL) AND WRITERID = #v_PUSERID# AND ( (A.APPRFLAG <> 'C' AND A.APPRFLAG <> 'N') OR A.APPRFLAG IS NULL ) AND StartDate < #nowDate# AND EndDate > #nowDate# AND B.GUBUN != 9

SELECT COUNT(ITEMID) FROM TBL_Board_Item_temp A INNER JOIN TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.BoardID = B.BoardID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND (WRITERCOMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# OR TRIM(B.COMPANYID) = '' OR B.COMPANYID IS NULL) AND WRITERID = #v_PUSERID#
SELECT DISTINCT B.BOARDID FROM TBL_Board_ApprList A JOIN TBL_Board_Item B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.BOARDID = B.BOARDID WHERE B.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND B.BOARDID = #boardId#

select.isEqual: SELECT COUNT(A.ITEMID) TOTALCOUNT FROM TBL_Board_Item A JOIN TBL_Photo_ImageItem B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.ItemID = B.ItemID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.BoardID = #boardId# AND STARTDATE < #nowDate# AND ENDDATE > #nowDate# AND B.Main_Flag = 'Y' AND A.APPRFLAG = 'Y'

SELECT COUNT(A.ITEMID) TOTALCOUNT FROM TBL_Board_Item A JOIN TBL_Photo_ImageItem B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.ItemID = B.ItemID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(USERID) TOTALCOUNT , ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_Board_Item_Read WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND USERID = #userId# AND BOARDID = #boardId# GROUP BY ITEMID, TENANT_ID ) D ON A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID AND A.ItemID = D.ITEMID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.BoardID = #boardId# AND STARTDATE < #nowDate# AND ENDDATE > #nowDate# AND D.TOTALCOUNT IS NULL AND A.APPRFLAG = 'Y'

SELECT COUNT(A.ITEMID) TOTALCOUNT FROM TBL_Board_Item A JOIN TBL_Photo_ImageItem B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.ItemID = B.ItemID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.BoardID = #boardId# AND STARTDATE < #nowDate# AND ENDDATE > #nowDate# AND B.Main_Flag = 'Y'

SELECT COUNT(A.ITEMID) TOTALCOUNT FROM TBL_Board_Item A JOIN TBL_Photo_ImageItem B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.ItemID = B.ItemID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(USERID) TOTALCOUNT , ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_Board_Item_Read WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND USERID = #userId# AND BOARDID = #boardId# GROUP BY ITEMID, TENANT_ID ) D ON A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID AND A.ItemID = D.ITEMID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.BoardID = #boardId# AND STARTDATE < #nowDate# AND ENDDATE > #nowDate# AND D.TOTALCOUNT IS NULL

SELECT COUNT(A.ITEMID) TOTALCOUNT FROM TBL_Board_Item A JOIN TBL_Photo_ImageItem B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.ItemID = B.ItemID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.BoardID = #boardId# AND STARTDATE < #nowDate# AND ENDDATE > #nowDate#

select.isNotEqual:
SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(ACCESSID) = 0 THEN 999 ELSE SUM(decode(READ_FG, 'false', 1, 0)) END FROM TBL_Board_BoardManage WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ACCESSID = #v_ACCESSID# AND BOARDID = ( SELECT BOARDID FROM TBL_Board_Item WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ITEMID = #v_ITEMID# )
AND BoardGroupACL = 'Y'
select.isEqual: SELECT COUNT(BOARDID) CNT FROM TBL_Board_Item_temp WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ITEMID = #v_ITEMID# AND WRITERID = #v_ACCESSID#

sqlMap.select:
SELECT COUNT(A.ITEMID) FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM A
JOIN( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT A.ITEMID, A.TENANT_ID, A.BOARDID, MAIN_FLAG, B.FILEPATH, CONTENT, FILECONTENT, MAINCONTENT, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY A.ITEMID ORDER BY CASE WHEN B.MAIN_FLAG = 'Y' THEN 1 WHEN GUID IS NOT NULL THEN GUID + 1 ELSE 100 END ) AS SN FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_ATTACHMENTS BIT RIGHT OUTER JOIN TBL_BOARD_ITEM A ON BIT.ITEMID = A.ITEMID AND BIT.TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_PHOTO_IMAGEITEM B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.ITEMID = B.ITEMID WHERE (UPPER(TITLE) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_TITLE_AND_CONTENT# || '%') OR UPPER(CONTENT) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_TITLE_AND_CONTENT# || '%') OR UPPER(FILECONTENT) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_TITLE_AND_CONTENT# || '%') OR UPPER(A.MAINCONTENT) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_TITLE_AND_CONTENT# || '%')) )A WHERE SN = 1 ) PART ON PART.ITEMID = A.ITEMID AND PART.TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID
LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER( PARTITION BY PARENTITEMID ORDER BY VERSION DESC ) RN, ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_BOARD_MODIFYHISTORY ) M1 ON A.ITEMID = M1.ITEMID AND A.TENANT_ID = M1.TENANT_ID WHERE
(A.BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# OR A.BOARDID IN (SELECT BOARDID FROM TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND PARENTBOARDID = #v_PBOARDID#))
A.BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID#
AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ( (A.APPRFLAG <> 'C' AND A.APPRFLAG <> 'N') OR A.APPRFLAG IS NULL ) AND STARTDATE < #nowDate# AND ENDDATE > #nowDate#
M1.RN = 1
(M1.ITEMID IS NULL OR M1.RN = 1)
AND UPPER(TITLE) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_TITLE# || '%')
AND UPPER(CONTENT) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_CONTENT# || '%')
AND (UPPER(A.WRITERNAME) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_WRITERNAME# || '%') OR UPPER(A.WRITERNAME2) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_WRITERNAME# || '%'))
AND A.WRITEDATE > #v_SEARCH_STARTDATE#
AND A.WRITEDATE < #v_SEARCH_ENDDATE#
AND UPPER(ABSTRACT) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_ABSTRACT# || '%')
AND (UPPER(TOPWRITERID) = UPPER(#v_SEARCH_TOPWRITERID#) OR EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = '1')
AND (UPPER(TITLE) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_TITLE_AND_CONTENT# || '%') OR UPPER(CONTENT) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_TITLE_AND_CONTENT# || '%'))
AND A.ITEMID in ( SELECT DISTINCT ITEMID FROM tbl_board_boarditem_keyword BK INNER JOIN TBL_BOARD_KEYWORD K ON BK.KEYWORDID = K.KEYWORDID AND BK.TENANT_ID = K.TENANT_ID WHERE UPPER(K.KEYWORDNAME) like UPPER(CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #v_KEYWORD#), '%')) AND BK.BOARDID = #v_pBoardID# AND BK.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# )

SELECT COUNT(ITEMID) CNT FROM TBL_Board_Item A INNER JOIN TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.BoardID = B.BoardID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND (WRITERCOMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# OR TRIM(B.COMPANYID) = '' OR B.COMPANYID IS NULL) AND WRITERID = #v_PUSERID# AND STARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND ENDDATE > #nowDate# AND extensionAttribute1 = '0' AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = '1' AND (A.APPRFLAG = 'Y' OR A.APPRFLAG IS NULL)

SELECT COUNT(ITEMID) FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM A INNER JOIN TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.BoardID = B.BoardID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND (WRITERCOMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# OR TRIM(B.COMPANYID) = '' OR B.COMPANYID IS NULL) AND WRITERID = #v_PUSERID# AND ( (A.APPRFLAG <> 'C' AND A.APPRFLAG <> 'N') OR A.APPRFLAG IS NULL ) AND STARTDATE < #nowDate# AND ENDDATE > #nowDate#
AND UPPER(TITLE) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_TITLE# || '%')
AND UPPER(CONTENT) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_CONTENT# || '%')
AND (UPPER(A.WRITERNAME) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_WRITERNAME# || '%') OR UPPER(A.WRITERNAME2) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_WRITERNAME# || '%'))
AND A.WRITEDATE > #v_SEARCH_STARTDATE#
AND A.WRITEDATE < #v_SEARCH_ENDDATE#
AND UPPER(ABSTRACT) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_ABSTRACT# || '%')
AND (UPPER(TOPWRITERID) = UPPER(#v_SEARCH_TOPWRITERID#) OR EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = '1')
AND (UPPER(TITLE) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_TITLE_AND_CONTENT# || '%') OR UPPER(CONTENT) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_TITLE_AND_CONTENT# || '%'))
AND ( B.USEKEYWORD = 'Y' AND A.ITEMID in ( SELECT DISTINCT ITEMID FROM tbl_board_boarditem_keyword BK INNER JOIN TBL_BOARD_KEYWORD K ON BK.KEYWORDID = K.KEYWORDID AND BK.TENANT_ID = K.TENANT_ID WHERE UPPER(K.KEYWORDNAME) like UPPER(CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #v_KEYWORD#), '%')) AND BK.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ) )

SELECT COUNT(ITEMID) FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_TEMP A INNER JOIN TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.BoardID = B.BoardID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND (A.WRITERCOMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# OR TRIM(B.COMPANYID) = '' OR B.COMPANYID IS NULL) AND WRITERID = #v_PUSERID#
AND UPPER(TITLE) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_TITLE# || '%')
AND UPPER(CONTENT) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_CONTENT# || '%')
AND (UPPER(A.WRITERNAME) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_WRITERNAME# || '%') OR UPPER(A.WRITERNAME2) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_WRITERNAME# || '%'))
AND A.WRITEDATE > #v_SEARCH_STARTDATE#
AND A.WRITEDATE < #v_SEARCH_ENDDATE#
AND UPPER(ABSTRACT) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_ABSTRACT# || '%')
AND (UPPER(TOPWRITERID) = UPPER(#v_SEARCH_TOPWRITERID#) OR EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = '1')
AND (UPPER(TITLE) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_TITLE_AND_CONTENT# || '%') OR UPPER(CONTENT) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_TITLE_AND_CONTENT# || '%'))
AND ( B.USEKEYWORD = 'Y' AND A.ITEMID in ( SELECT DISTINCT ITEMID FROM tbl_board_boarditem_keyword BK INNER JOIN TBL_BOARD_KEYWORD K ON BK.KEYWORDID = K.KEYWORDID AND BK.TENANT_ID = K.TENANT_ID WHERE UPPER(K.KEYWORDNAME) like UPPER(CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #v_KEYWORD#), '%')) AND BK.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ) )

select.isEqual: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT ITEMID FROM TBL_Board_Item_Read WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ItemID = #v_pItemID# AND UserID = #v_pUserID# AND BoardID = ( SELECT BOARDID FROM TBL_Board_Item WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ItemID = #v_pItemID# ) )
select.isNotEqual: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT ITEMID FROM TBL_Board_Item_Read WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ItemID = #v_pItemID# AND UserID = #v_pUserID# AND BoardID = #v_pBoardID# )

sqlMap.select: SELECT WRITERID FROM TBL_Board_Item WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ItemID = #v_pItemID#

select.isEqual: SELECT CONTENTLOCATION AS FILEPATH FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ITEMID = #docID#
SELECT CONTENTLOCATION AS FILEPATH FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_TEMP WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ITEMID = #docID#
SELECT FORMLOCATION AS FILEPATH FROM TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND BOARDID = #docID#

sqlMap.select: SELECT FILEPATH, FILENAME FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_ATTACHMENTS WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ITEMID = #itemID# AND GUID = #attID#
SELECT APPRFLAG FROM TBL_Board_BoardInfo WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND boardid = #boardID#
SELECT BOARDNAME FROM TBL_Board_BoardInfo WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND BOARDID = #boardID#
SELECT * FROM TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND boardid = #v_BOARDID#

SELECT LISTCOUNT , PREVIEW , PREVIEWWLIST , PREVIEWWCONTENT , PREVIEWHLIST , PREVIEWHCONTENT, ALLNEWBOARDLISTDATE, CONTENTSIZE FROM TBL_BOARD_CONFIGURATION WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND userid = #v_USERID#
SELECT * FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_ATTACHMENTS WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND itemid = #itemID# ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(GUID)
SELECT IMAGENAME AS FILENAME, FILEPATH FROM TBL_PHOTO_IMAGEITEM WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND itemid = #itemID# ORDER BY IMAGEID ASC

SELECT ITEMID , TITLE FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM WHERE tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND boardid = #v_PBOARDID# AND parentwritedate = #v_PPARENTWRITEDATE# AND TO_CHAR(upperitemidtree) LIKE #v_PUPPERITEMIDTREE# || '%' AND startdate <= #nowDate# AND enddate > #nowDate# ORDER BY TO_CHAR(upperitemidtree), startdate DESC

SELECT * FROM (SELECT ITEMID , TITLE FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM WHERE tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND boardid = #v_PBOARDID# AND parentwritedate >= #v_PPARENTWRITEDATE# AND startdate <= #nowDate# AND enddate > #nowDate# ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(parentwritedate) ASC, TO_CHAR(upperitemidtree) , startdate ASC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 20

SELECT * FROM (SELECT ITEMID , TITLE FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM WHERE tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND boardid = #v_PBOARDID# AND parentwritedate >= #v_PPARENTWRITEDATE# AND startdate <= #nowDate# AND enddate > #nowDate# ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(parentwritedate) DESC, startdate DESC, docno DESC, TO_CHAR(upperitemidtree) ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 20

SELECT * FROM (SELECT ITEMID , TITLE FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM WHERE tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND boardid = #v_PBOARDID# AND parentwritedate <= #v_PPARENTWRITEDATE# AND startdate <= #nowDate# AND enddate > #nowDate# ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(parentwritedate) DESC, startdate DESC, docno DESC, TO_CHAR(upperitemidtree) ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 20

SELECT COUNT(itemid) CNT FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND boardid = #boardId# AND startdate <= #nowDate# AND enddate > #nowDate# AND ntstartdate <= #nowDate# AND ntenddate > #nowDate# AND extensionattribute1 = '0' AND extensionattribute2 = '1' AND (APPRFLAG = 'Y' OR APPRFLAG IS NULL)

SELECT COUNT(B.APPRUSERID) AS cnt FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM A JOIN TBL_BOARD_APPRLIST B ON A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id AND A.boardid = B.boardid WHERE A.tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND A.itemid = #v_PITEMID# AND B.appruserid = #v_PUSERID#
SELECT COUNT(BOARDID) FROM TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND boardid = #boardID# AND background = 'Y'

select.isNotEqual:
SELECT A.REPLYID,
A.USERNAME2 AS USERNAME,
A.USERNAME AS USERNAME,
A.USERID, A.CONTENT, TO_CHAR(A.WRITEDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS WRITEDATE, DEPTID, COUNT(CASE WHEN R.REACTFLAG = 'Y' THEN '1' END) AS RE_LIKE, COUNT(CASE WHEN R.REACTFLAG = 'N' THEN '1' END) AS RE_HATE, A.PARENTREPLYID, A.PARENTWRITERNAME, NVL(A.PARENTREPLYID, A.REPLYID) AS GROUPID, NVL2(A.PARENTREPLYID, D.WRITEDATE, A.WRITEDATE) AS GROUPDATE, NVL(A.REPLYLEVEL, 1) AS REPLYLEVEL, TO_CHAR(A.UPDATEDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS UPDATEDATE, A.IMAGECONTENT, BC.fileName, BC.fileSize, BC.SN as fileSN, BC.filePath FROM TBL_BOARD_ONELINEREPLY A LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_BOARD_ONELINEREPLY D ON A.PARENTREPLYID = D.REPLYID AND A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_BOARD_REPLY_REACT R ON A.REPLYID = R.REPLYID AND A.ITEMID = R.ITEMID AND A.TENANT_ID = R.TENANT_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT T.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY T.CN ORDER BY ROWNUM) CNT FROM ((SELECT D.CN, D.DEPARTMENT as DEPTID, D.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME as COMPANYID, D.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_USERMASTER D WHERE D.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
AND D.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #v_COMPANYID#
) UNION ALL (SELECT B.cn, A2.DEPTID, C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 as COMPANYID, A2.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_USERMASTER B INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A2 ON A2.CN = B.CN AND A2.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID RIGHT JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER C ON A2.DEPTID = C.CN AND B.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #v_COMPANYID# WHERE A2.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#)) T ) TR ON A.USERID = TR.CN AND TR.CNT = 1 AND A.TENANT_ID = TR.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_BOARD_COMMENT_ATTACHMENTS BC ON A.REPLYID = BC.REPLYID AND A.ITEMID = BC.ITEMID AND A.TENANT_ID = BC.TENANT_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND A.BOARDID = #v_BoardID# AND A.ITEMID = #v_ItemID# GROUP BY A.REPLYID,
A.USERNAME2,
A.USERNAME,
A.USERID, A.CONTENT, A.WRITEDATE, DEPTID, A.PARENTREPLYID, A.REPLYLEVEL, A.PARENTWRITERNAME, A.UPDATEDATE, D.WRITEDATE, A.IMAGECONTENT, BC.fileName, BC.fileSize, BC.SN, BC.filePath
ORDER BY GROUPDATE, GROUPID, A.WRITEDATE, BC.SN
ORDER BY GROUPDATE DESC, GROUPID ASC, A.WRITEDATE ASC, BC.SN
select.isEqual:
SELECT A.REPLYID,
A.USERNAME2 AS USERNAME,
A.USERNAME AS USERNAME,
A.USERID, A.CONTENT, TO_CHAR(A.WRITEDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')AS WRITEDATE, COUNT(CASE WHEN R.REACTFLAG = 'Y' THEN '1' END) AS RE_LIKE, COUNT(CASE WHEN R.REACTFLAG = 'N' THEN '1' END) AS RE_HATE, A.PARENTREPLYID, A.PARENTWRITERNAME, NVL(A.PARENTREPLYID, A.REPLYID) AS GROUPID, NVL2(A.PARENTREPLYID, D.WRITEDATE, A.WRITEDATE) AS GROUPDATE, NVL(A.REPLYLEVEL, 1) AS REPLYLEVEL, TO_CHAR(A.UPDATEDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS UPDATEDATE, A.IMAGECONTENT, BC.fileName, BC.fileSize, BC.SN as fileSN, BC.filePath FROM TBL_BOARD_ONELINEREPLY A LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_BOARD_ONELINEREPLY D ON A.PARENTREPLYID = D.REPLYID AND A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_BOARD_REPLY_REACT R ON A.REPLYID = R.REPLYID AND A.ITEMID = R.ITEMID AND A.TENANT_ID = R.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_BOARD_COMMENT_ATTACHMENTS BC ON A.REPLYID = BC.REPLYID AND A.ITEMID = BC.ITEMID AND A.TENANT_ID = BC.TENANT_ID WHERE A.tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND A.boardid = #v_BoardID# AND A.itemid = #v_ItemID# GROUP BY A.REPLYID,
A.USERNAME2,
A.USERNAME,
A.USERID, A.CONTENT, A.WRITEDATE, A.PARENTREPLYID, A.REPLYLEVEL, A.PARENTWRITERNAME, A.UPDATEDATE, D.WRITEDATE, A.IMAGECONTENT, BC.fileName, BC.fileSize, BC.SN, BC.filePath
ORDER BY GROUPDATE, GROUPID, A.WRITEDATE, BC.SN
ORDER BY GROUPDATE DESC, GROUPID ASC, A.WRITEDATE ASC

sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(REPLYID) FROM TBL_BOARD_ONELINEREPLY WHERE tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND replyid = #v_ReplyID# AND userid = #v_UserID#

SELECT COUNT(B.APPRUSERID) FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM A JOIN TBL_BOARD_APPRLIST B ON A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id AND A.boardid = B.boardid WHERE A.tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND A.itemid = #v_PITEMID# AND B.appruserid = #v_PUSERID#
SELECT PARENTBOARDID FROM TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND boardid = #boardID#
SELECT DOCPASSWORD FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND itemid = #itemID#
SELECT password FROM TBL_BOARD_ONELINEREPLY WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND itemID = #itemID# AND replyID = #replyID#

SELECT COUNT(ITEMID) FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM A INNER JOIN TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.BoardID = B.BoardID WHERE A.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND (writercompanyid = #companyID# OR TRIM(B.COMPANYID) = '' OR B.COMPANYID IS NULL) AND writerid = #userID# AND startdate > #nowDate#

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_BOARD_APPRLIST A JOIN TBL_BOARD_ITEM B ON A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id AND A.boardid = B.boardid INNER JOIN TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO C ON A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND A.BoardID = C.BoardID WHERE A.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND (B.writercompanyid = #companyID# OR TRIM(C.COMPANYID) = '' OR C.COMPANYID IS NULL) AND A.appruserid = #id# AND B.apprflag = 'N' AND B.startdate <= #nowDate# AND B.enddate > #nowDate#

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM A JOIN TBL_BOARD_APPRLIST B ON A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id AND A.boardid = B.boardid INNER JOIN TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO C ON A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND A.BoardID = C.BoardID WHERE B.tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND (A.WRITERCOMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# OR TRIM(C.COMPANYID) = '' OR C.COMPANYID IS NULL) AND B.appruserid = #v_PUSERID# AND A.apprflag = 'N' AND A.startdate <= #nowDate# AND A.enddate > #nowDate#
AND UPPER(TITLE) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_TITLE# || '%')
AND UPPER(CONTENT) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_CONTENT# || '%')
AND (UPPER(A.WRITERNAME) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_WRITERNAME# || '%') OR UPPER(A.WRITERNAME2) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_WRITERNAME# || '%'))
AND A.WRITEDATE > #v_SEARCH_STARTDATE#
AND A.WRITEDATE < #v_SEARCH_ENDDATE#
AND UPPER(ABSTRACT) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_ABSTRACT# || '%')
AND (UPPER(TOPWRITERID) = UPPER(#v_SEARCH_TOPWRITERID#) OR EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = '1')
AND (UPPER(TITLE) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_TITLE_AND_CONTENT# || '%') OR UPPER(CONTENT) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_TITLE_AND_CONTENT# || '%'))
AND ( C.USEKEYWORD = 'Y' AND A.ITEMID in ( SELECT DISTINCT ITEMID FROM tbl_board_boarditem_keyword BK INNER JOIN TBL_BOARD_KEYWORD K ON BK.KEYWORDID = K.KEYWORDID AND BK.TENANT_ID = K.TENANT_ID WHERE UPPER(K.KEYWORDNAME) like UPPER(CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #v_KEYWORD#), '%')) AND BK.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ) )

SELECT DISTINCT WRITERID, CASE WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN WRITERNAME2 ELSE WRITERNAME END AS WRITERNAME, TUM.MAIL FROM TBL_Board_Item TBI INNER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER TUM ON TBI.TENANT_ID = TUM.TENANT_ID AND TBI.WRITERID = TUM.CN WHERE TBI.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND BoardID = #boardID# AND ItemID like #itemTreeID# || '%'

SELECT A.APPRUSERID AS ID, B.MAIL AS EMAIL, CASE WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN B.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE B.DISPLAYNAME END AS DISPLAYNAME FROM TBL_BOARD_APPRLIST A INNER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.APPRUSERID = B.CN WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.BOARDID = #boardID#

select.isEqual: SELECT ACCESSID, ACCESSNAME FROM TBL_BOARD_BOARDMANAGE WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND boardid = #boardID# AND boardadmin_fg = 'true' AND postnotice = 'true'
select.isNotEqual: SELECT ACCESSID, ACCESSNAME2 AS ACCESSNAME FROM TBL_BOARD_BOARDMANAGE WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND boardid = #boardID# AND boardadmin_fg = 'true' AND postnotice = 'true'

sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND boardid = #boardID# AND itemid = #itemID#

insert.isEqual:
INSERT INTO TBL_Board_Item ( ItemID, BoardID, WriterID, WriterName, WriterName2, WriterDeptID, WriterDeptName, WriterDeptName2, WriterCompanyID, WriterCompanyName, WriterCompanyName2, WriteDate, ParentWriteDate, Importance, Title, ContentLocation, ReadCount, StartDate, EndDate, Abstract, Attachments, UpperItemIDTree, ItemLevel, copieditem, ExtensionAttribute1, ExtensionAttribute2, ExtensionAttribute3, ExtensionAttribute32, ExtensionAttribute4, ExtensionAttribute5, DocNo, DocPassWord, TopWriterID, extensionAttribute6, extensionAttribute7, extensionAttribute8, extensionAttribute9, extensionAttribute10, tenant_id, content, ntstartdate, ntenddate, PUBLICFLAG, writerNameType ) VALUES ( #itemID#, #boardID#, #writerID#, #writerName#, #writerName2#, #writerDeptID#, #writerDeptName#, #writerDeptName2#, #writerCompanyID#, #writerCompanyName#, #writerCompanyName2#, #writeDate#, ( SELECT CASE WHEN MAX(DOCNO) IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE MAX(DOCNO) + 1 END FROM TBL_Board_Item A WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND BOARDID = #boardID# ), #importance#, #title#, #contentLocation#, #readCount#, #startDate#, #endDate#, #ABSTRACT#, #hasAttach#, #upperItemIDTree#, #itemLevel#, 0, #extensionAttribute1#, #extensionAttribute2#, #extensionAttribute3#, #extensionAttribute32#, #extensionAttribute4#, #extensionAttribute5#,
( SELECT CASE WHEN MAX(DOCNO) IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE MAX(DOCNO) + 1 END FROM TBL_Board_Item A WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND BOARDID = #boardID# ),
( SELECT DOCNO FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM WHERE ITEMID = #itemID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ),
( SELECT CASE WHEN MAX(DOCNO) IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE MAX(DOCNO) + 1 END FROM TBL_Board_Item A WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND BOARDID = #boardID# ),
#docPassword#, #topWriterID#, #extensionAttribute6#, #extensionAttribute7#, #extensionAttribute8#, #extensionAttribute9#, #extensionAttribute10#, #tenantID#, #content#, #notiStart#, #notiEnd#, #publicFlag#, #writerNameType# )
insert.isNotEqual:
INSERT INTO TBL_Board_Item ( ItemID, BoardID, WriterID, WriterName, WriterName2, WriterDeptID, WriterDeptName, WriterDeptName2, WriterCompanyID, WriterCompanyName, WriterCompanyName2, WriteDate, ParentWriteDate, Importance, Title, ContentLocation, ReadCount, StartDate, EndDate, Abstract, Attachments, UpperItemIDTree, ItemLevel, copieditem, ExtensionAttribute1, ExtensionAttribute2, ExtensionAttribute3, ExtensionAttribute32, ExtensionAttribute4, ExtensionAttribute5, DocNo, DocPassWord, TopWriterID, extensionAttribute6, extensionAttribute7, extensionAttribute8, extensionAttribute9, extensionAttribute10, tenant_id, content, ntstartdate, ntenddate, PUBLICFLAG, writerNameType ) VALUES ( #itemID#, #boardID#, #writerID#, #writerName#, #writerName2#, #writerDeptID#, #writerDeptName#, #writerDeptName2#, #writerCompanyID#, #writerCompanyName#, #writerCompanyName2#, #writeDate#, #parentWriteDate#, #importance#, #title#, #contentLocation#, #readCount#, #startDate#, #endDate#, #ABSTRACT#, #hasAttach#, #upperItemIDTree#, #itemLevel#, 0, #extensionAttribute1#, #extensionAttribute2#, #extensionAttribute3#, #extensionAttribute32#, #extensionAttribute4#, #extensionAttribute5#,
( SELECT /*asd*/ CASE WHEN MAX(DOCNO) IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE MAX(DOCNO) + 1 END FROM TBL_Board_Item A WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND BOARDID = #boardID# ),
( SELECT DOCNO FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM WHERE ITEMID = #parentItemID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ),
( SELECT CASE WHEN MAX(DOCNO) IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE MAX(DOCNO) + 1 END FROM TBL_Board_Item A WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND BOARDID = #boardID# ),
#docPassword#, #topWriterID#, #extensionAttribute6#, #extensionAttribute7#, #extensionAttribute8#, #extensionAttribute9#, #extensionAttribute10#, #tenantID#, #content#, #notiStart#, #notiEnd#, #publicFlag#, #writerNameType# )

sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_Board_MyBoards SET VIEWORDER = #count# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND (COMPANYID = #companyID# OR TRIM(COMPANYID) = '' OR COMPANYID = '*') AND BOARDID = #boardID# AND ( USERID = #userID# OR USERID = 'everyone' )
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_Board_MyBoards WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND (COMPANYID = #companyID# OR COMPANYID = '*') AND BOARDID = #boardID# AND USERID = #userID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_BOARD_NEWBOARD_ORDERINFO SET VIEWORDER = ( SELECT VIEWORDER FROM TBL_Board_MyBoards WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND BOARDID = '{FFFFFFFF-FFFF-FFFF-FFFF-FFFFFFFFFFFF}' AND (COMPANYID = #companyID# OR TRIM(COMPANYID) = '')) WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND USERID = #userID#
UPDATE TBL_BOARD_NEWBOARD_ORDERINFO SET TABUSED = #v_TABUSED# WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# AND USERID = #v_USERID#
UPDATE TBL_Board_MyBoards SET TABUSED = #v_TABUSED# WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_BOARDID# AND USERID = #v_USERID#

UPDATE TBL_Board_Configuration SET LISTCOUNT = #listCount#, PREVIEW = #preview#, PREVIEWWLIST = #previewWList#, PREVIEWWCONTENT = #previewWContent#, PREVIEWHLIST = #previewHList#, PREVIEWHCONTENT = #previewHContent#, ALLNEWBOARDLISTDATE = #allNewBoardListDate#, CONTENTSIZE = #contentSize# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND USERID = #userId#

UPDATE TBL_Board_Configuration SET PREVIEW = #v_PREVIEWMODE#, PREVIEWWLIST = #v_LIST#, PREVIEWWCONTENT = #v_CONTENT#, ListCount = #v_LISTCNT# WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND USERID = #v_USERID#
UPDATE TBL_Board_Configuration SET PREVIEW = #v_PREVIEWMODE#, PREVIEWHLIST = #v_LIST#, PREVIEWHCONTENT = #v_CONTENT#, ListCount = #v_LISTCNT# WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND USERID = #v_USERID#

sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_Board_Item SET ReadCount = ReadCount + 1 WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ItemID = #v_pItemID#
UPDATE TBL_Board_Item SET NOTINO = #sn# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ITEMID = #itemID#
UPDATE TBL_Photo_ImageItem SET main_Flag = CASE WHEN TRIM(imageID) = #v_IMAGEID# THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END WHERE tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND ItemID = #v_ITEMID#
UPDATE TBL_Board_Configuration SET ListCount = #v_LISTCOUNT#, PreView = #v_PREVIEW# WHERE tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND UserID = #v_USERID#
UPDATE TBL_Board_Item SET COPIEDITEM = 1 WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ITEMID = #destItemID#

update.isEqual: UPDATE TBL_Board_Item SET APPRFLAG = 'Y' WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ITEMID = #v_ITEMID#
UPDATE TBL_Board_Item SET APPRFLAG = 'C' WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ITEMID = #v_ITEMID#

isNotEqual.isNotEqual: UPDATE TBL_Board_Item SET APPRFLAG = 'N' WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ITEMID = #v_ITEMID#

update.isNotEmpty: UPDATE TBL_Photo_ImageItem SET FilePath = #v_FilePath#, FileContent = #v_FileContent#, ImageName = #v_OFileName#, WriteDate = #nowDate# WHERE tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND TRIM(ImageID) = #v_ImageID# AND TRIM(BoardID) = #v_BoardID#
update.isEmpty: UPDATE TBL_Photo_ImageItem SET FileContent = #v_FileContent# WHERE tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND TRIM(ImageID) = #v_ImageID# AND TRIM(BoardID) = #v_BoardID#

sqlMap.update:
UPDATE TBL_Board_Item SET UpdateDate = #writeDate#, Importance = #importance#, Title = #title#,
WRITEDATE = #writeDate#, STARTDATE = #startDate#,
EndDate = #endDate#, Abstract = #ABSTRACT#, Attachments = #hasAttach#, ExtensionAttribute2 = #extensionAttribute2#, ExtensionAttribute4 = #extensionAttribute4#, ExtensionAttribute5 = #extensionAttribute5#, DocPassWord = #docPassword#, extensionAttribute6 = #extensionAttribute6#, extensionAttribute7 = #extensionAttribute7#, extensionAttribute8 = #extensionAttribute8#, extensionAttribute9 = #extensionAttribute9#, extensionAttribute10 = #extensionAttribute10#, content = #content#, ntstartdate = #notiStart#, ntenddate = #notiEnd#, PUBLICFLAG = #publicFlag#, updaterid = #updaterID#
writerId = #writerID#, writerName = #writerName#, writerName2 = #writerName2#
writerNameType = #writerNameType#
WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ItemID = #itemID#
UPDATE TBL_Board_Item SET ReadCount = 0 WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ItemID = #itemID#
UPDATE TBL_Board_Item SET APPRFLAG = 'N' WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND apprFlag = 'C' AND ItemID = #itemID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_Board_Item_Read WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ItemID = #itemID#

DELETE FROM TBL_Board_Item_Attachments WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ITEMID = #itemID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_Board_DeleteReservedItem ( BOARDID, ITEMID, TENANT_ID ) SELECT #boardID#, #itemID#, #tenantID# FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TBL_Board_DeleteReservedItem WHERE BOARDID = #boardID# AND ITEMID = #itemID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# )
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_Board_Item_temp WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ITEMID = #itemID#
DELETE FROM TBL_Photo_ImageItem WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TRIM(ImageID) = #v_ImageID# AND BoardID = #v_BoardID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_BOARD_ITEM SET copieditem = 1 WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND itemid = #destItemID#
UPDATE TBL_BOARD_ITEM SET title = #v_TITLE#, maincontent = #v_CONTENT# WHERE tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND boardid = #v_BOARDID# AND itemid = #v_ITEMID#
UPDATE TBL_BOARD_ITEM_TEMP SET title = #v_TITLE#, maincontent = #v_CONTENT# WHERE tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND boardid = #v_BOARDID# AND itemid = #v_ITEMID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_Photo_ImageItem WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TRIM(IMAGEID) = #v_pIMAGEID#
DELETE FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_ATTACHMENTS WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND itemid = #itemID#
DELETE FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_TEMP WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND itemid = #itemID#
DELETE FROM TBL_PHOTO_IMAGEITEM WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND itemid = #itemID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT A.ITEMID , A.STARTDATE , A.TITLE , A.ABSTRACT FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM A LEFT JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(USERID) TOTALCOUNT , ITEMID FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_READ WHERE USERID = #v_PUSERID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# GROUP BY ITEMID ) D ON A.ITEMID = D.ITEMID WHERE BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# AND STARTDATE <= TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#nowDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')) AND ENDDATE > TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#nowDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')) AND D.TOTALCOUNT IS NULL AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(A.PARENTWRITEDATE) DESC, to_char(A.UPPERITEMIDTREE) ASC, A.STARTDATE DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #v_PMAXCOUNT#

SELECT COUNT(A.ItemID) CNT FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM A LEFT JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(USERID) TOTALCOUNT,ITEMID FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_READ WHERE USERID = #v_PUSERID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# GROUP BY ITEMID ) D ON A.ITEMID = D.ITEMID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# AND STARTDATE <= TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#nowDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')) AND ENDDATE > TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#nowDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')) AND D.TOTALCOUNT IS NULL

SELECT B.BOARDID, B.ITEMID, B.TENANT_ID AS TENANTID FROM TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO A JOIN TBL_BOARD_ITEM B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.BOARDID = B.BOARDID WHERE A.BOARDID IN ( SELECT BOARDID FROM TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO WHERE DELETEAFTER > -1 AND BOARDID <> '{FFFFFFFF-FFFF-FFFF-FFFF-FFFFFFFFFFFF}') AND B.ENDDATE < TO_CHAR(SYS_EXTRACT_UTC(SYSTIMESTAMP) - A.DELETEAFTER, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
SELECT BOARDID, TENANT_ID AS TENANTID FROM TBL_BOARD_DELETERESERVEDBOARD
SELECT BOARDID, ITEMID, TENANT_ID AS TENANTID FROM TBL_BOARD_DELETERESERVEDITEM
SELECT DISTINCT A.BOARDID, A.ITEMID, A.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_BOARDITEM_SCRAP A LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_BOARD_ITEM B ON A.BOARDID = B.BOARDID AND A.ITEMID = B.ITEMID WHERE B.ITEMID IS NULL
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_BOARDITEM_SCRAP WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND BOARDID = #boardID# AND itemID = #itemID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT DISTINCT A.BOARDID, A.ITEMID, A.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_USERSCRAPCONTLIST A LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_BOARD_ITEM B ON A.BOARDID = B.BOARDID AND A.ITEMID = B.ITEMID WHERE B.ITEMID IS NULL
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_USERSCRAPCONTLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND BOARDID = #boardID# AND itemID = #itemID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(ITEMID) TOTALCOUNT FROM TBL_Board_Item WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND BOARDID = #boardId# AND (APPRFLAG = 'Y' OR APPRFLAG IS NULL)
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_BOARD_DELETERESERVEDITEM WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND BOARDID = #boardID# AND itemID = #itemID#
DELETE FROM TBL_BOARD_DELETERESERVEDBOARD WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND BOARDID = #boardID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE CN = #id# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT * FROM TBL_VOTE_CONFIGURATION WHERE USER_ID = #user_id# AND TENANT_ID = #tenant_id#

insert.selectKey: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT USER_ID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_VOTE_CONFIGURATION WHERE USER_ID = #user_id# AND TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# )
insert.isNotEqual: UPDATE TBL_VOTE_CONFIGURATION SET USER_ID = #user_id#, START_TIME = #start_time#, END_TIME = #end_time#, TARGET_DEPTS = #target_depts#, TARGET_USERS = #target_users#, TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# WHERE USER_ID = #user_id# AND TENANT_ID = #tenant_id#

sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(replyID) FROM tbl_board_onelinereply WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND boardID = #boardID# AND ItemID = #itemID# AND (CONTENT IS NOT NULL OR IMAGECONTENT IS NOT NULL)

SELECT COUNT(R.USERID) FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_READ R INNER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER U ON R.TENANT_ID = U.TENANT_ID AND R.USERID = U.CN WHERE R.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND R.BOARDID = #boardID# AND R.ITEMID = #itemID# AND R.USERID <> ( SELECT WRITERID FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ITEMID = #itemID# )
SELECT COUNT(USERID) AS TOTALCOUNT FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_READ WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND USERID = #v_PUSERID# AND BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# AND ITEMID = #v_ITEMID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_BOARD_ONELINEREPLY SET BOARDID = #destBoardID#, ITEMID = #destItemID# WHERE BOARDID = #orgBoardID# AND ITEMID = #orgItemID#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM (SELECT Row_Number() OVER ( ORDER BY A.ITEMID A.WRITERNAME A.WRITERDEPTNAME A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME A.STARTDATE A.WRITEDATE A.TITLE A.ATTACHMENTS A.DOCNO TO_NUMBER(A.PARENTWRITEDATE) A.READCOUNT
CASE WHEN ( (CASE WHEN #lang# = '1' THEN I.BOARDNAME WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN I.BOARDNAME2 WHEN #lang# = '3' THEN I.BOARDNAME3 WHEN #lang# = '4' THEN I.BOARDNAME4 WHEN #lang# = '6' THEN I.BOARDNAME6 ELSE I.BOARDNAME END) = '' OR (CASE WHEN #lang# = '1' THEN I.BOARDNAME WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN I.BOARDNAME2 WHEN #lang# = '3' THEN I.BOARDNAME3 WHEN #lang# = '4' THEN I.BOARDNAME4 WHEN #lang# = '6' THEN I.BOARDNAME6 ELSE I.BOARDNAME END) IS NULL ) THEN I.BOARDNAME ELSE (CASE WHEN #lang# = '1' THEN I.BOARDNAME WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN I.BOARDNAME2 WHEN #lang# = '3' THEN I.BOARDNAME3 WHEN #lang# = '4' THEN I.BOARDNAME4 WHEN #lang# = '6' THEN I.BOARDNAME6 ELSE I.BOARDNAME END) END
DESC , TO_CHAR(A.UPPERITEMIDTREE) DESC ) AS ROWNUM_, A.BOARDID, A.ITEMID, A.WRITERID, A.WRITERNAME, A.WRITERDEPTNAME, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME, A.STARTDATE, A.WRITEDATE, A.PARENTWRITEDATE, A.IMPORTANCE, A.TITLE, A.READCOUNT, A.ATTACHMENTS, EXT, F.FILEPATH, A.ITEMLEVEL, A.ABSTRACT, CASE WHEN D.TOTALCOUNT IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE '1' END READFLAG, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5, A.WRITERNAME2, A.WRITERDEPTNAME2, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME2, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_Board_OneLineReply WHERE TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND ITEMID = A.ItemID) ONELINECNT, A.UPPERITEMIDTREE, A.DOCNO, '' AS NOTICE, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10, CASE WHEN ( (CASE WHEN #lang# = '1' THEN I.BOARDNAME WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN I.BOARDNAME2 WHEN #lang# = '3' THEN I.BOARDNAME3 WHEN #lang# = '4' THEN I.BOARDNAME4 WHEN #lang# = '6' THEN I.BOARDNAME6 ELSE I.BOARDNAME END) = '' OR (CASE WHEN #lang# = '1' THEN I.BOARDNAME WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN I.BOARDNAME2 WHEN #lang# = '3' THEN I.BOARDNAME3 WHEN #lang# = '4' THEN I.BOARDNAME4 WHEN #lang# = '6' THEN I.BOARDNAME6 ELSE I.BOARDNAME END) IS NULL ) THEN I.BOARDNAME ELSE (CASE WHEN #lang# = '1' THEN I.BOARDNAME WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN I.BOARDNAME2 WHEN #lang# = '3' THEN I.BOARDNAME3 WHEN #lang# = '4' THEN I.BOARDNAME4 WHEN #lang# = '6' THEN I.BOARDNAME6 ELSE I.BOARDNAME END) END BOARDNAME, I.GUBUN FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM A LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT COUNT(USERID) AS TOTALCOUNT, ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_READ WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND USERID = #v_PUSERID# GROUP BY ITEMID, TENANT_ID) D ON A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID AND A.ITEMID = D.ITEMID INNER JOIN TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO I ON A.TENANT_ID = I.TENANT_ID AND (I.COMPANYID = #v_pCompanyID# OR TRIM(I.COMPANYID ) = '' OR I.COMPANYID IS NULL) AND A.BOARDID = I.BOARDID LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 0 THEN 'NONE' WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 1 THEN MAX(TO_CHAR(FILENAME)) ELSE 'MANY' END AS EXT, CASE WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 0 THEN 'NONE' WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 1 THEN MAX(TO_CHAR(FILEPATH)) ELSE 'MANY' END AS FILEPATH, TENANT_ID, itemid FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_ATTACHMENTS GROUP BY ITEMID, TENANT_ID ) F ON A.ITEMID = F.ITEMID AND A.TENANT_ID = F.TENANT_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER( PARTITION BY PARENTITEMID ORDER BY VERSION DESC ) RN, ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_BOARD_MODIFYHISTORY ) M1 WHERE M1.RN = 1 ) M2 ON A.ITEMID = M2.ITEMID AND A.TENANT_ID = M2.TENANT_ID
INNER JOIN TBL_Photo_ImageItem B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.ItemID = B.ItemID JOIN( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT A.ITEMID, A.TENANT_ID, A.BOARDID, MAIN_FLAG, B.FILEPATH, CONTENT, FILECONTENT, MAINCONTENT, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY A.ITEMID ORDER BY CASE WHEN B.MAIN_FLAG = 'Y' THEN 1 WHEN GUID IS NOT NULL THEN GUID + 1 ELSE 100 END ) AS SN FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_ATTACHMENTS BIT RIGHT JOIN TBL_BOARD_ITEM A ON BIT.ITEMID = A.ITEMID AND BIT.TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_PHOTO_IMAGEITEM B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.ITEMID = B.ITEMID ) A2 WHERE SN = 1 ) PART ON PART.ITEMID = A.ITEMID AND PART.TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND B.MAIN_FLAG = PART.MAIN_FLAG
WHERE
(1=1)
A.BOARDID IN (SELECT BOARDID FROM TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDGROUPID = #v_PBOARDID#)
(A.BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# OR I.BOARDTREEPATH LIKE '%' || #v_PBOARDID# || '%')
AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND (A.WRITERCOMPANYID = #v_pCompanyID# OR TRIM(A.WRITERCOMPANYID) = '' OR A.WRITERCOMPANYID IS NULL OR TRIM(I.COMPANYID) = '' OR I.COMPANYID IS NULL)
AND (
I.BOARDID IN #v_listviewList[]#
OR (
(A.TOPWRITERID = #v_PUSERID# OR A.WRITERID = #v_PUSERID# OR EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = '1') AND I.BOARDID IN #v_qnaItemList[]#
)
)
AND STARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND ENDDATE > #nowDate# AND ( (A.APPRFLAG <> 'C' AND A.APPRFLAG <> 'N') OR A.APPRFLAG IS NULL )
AND UPPER(TITLE) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_TITLE# || '%')
AND ( UPPER(A.CONTENT) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_CONTENT# || '%') OR UPPER(PART.FILECONTENT) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_CONTENT# || '%') OR UPPER(PART.MAINCONTENT) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_CONTENT# || '%') )
AND (UPPER(A.WRITERNAME) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_WRITERNAME# || '%') OR UPPER(A.WRITERNAME2) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_WRITERNAME# || '%'))
AND A.WRITEDATE > #v_SEARCH_STARTDATE#
AND A.WRITEDATE < #v_SEARCH_ENDDATE#
AND UPPER(ABSTRACT) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_ABSTRACT# || '%')
AND (UPPER(TOPWRITERID) = UPPER(#v_SEARCH_TOPWRITERID#) OR EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = '1')
AND (UPPER(TITLE) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_TITLE_AND_CONTENT# || '%') OR UPPER(CONTENT) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_TITLE_AND_CONTENT# || '%'))
AND ( I.USEKEYWORD = 'Y' AND A.ITEMID in ( SELECT DISTINCT ITEMID FROM tbl_board_boarditem_keyword BK INNER JOIN TBL_BOARD_KEYWORD K ON BK.KEYWORDID = K.KEYWORDID AND BK.TENANT_ID = K.TENANT_ID WHERE
UPPER(K.KEYWORDNAME) = UPPER(#v_KEYWORDCLICK#)
UPPER(K.KEYWORDNAME) like UPPER(CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #v_KEYWORD#), '%'))
AND BK.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ) )
AND (I.VERSIONMANAGE = 'Y' AND M2.ITEMID IS NOT NULL OR I.VERSIONMANAGE = 'N')
) T1 WHERE ROWNUM_ <= #v_PENDROW#) T2 WHERE ROWNUM_ >= #v_PSTARTROW#

SELECT COUNT(A.ITEMID) FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM A INNER JOIN TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO I ON A.TENANT_ID = I.TENANT_ID AND A.BOARDID = I.BOARDID LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER( PARTITION BY PARENTITEMID ORDER BY VERSION DESC ) RN, ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_BOARD_MODIFYHISTORY ) M1 WHERE M1.RN = 1 ) M2 ON A.ITEMID = M2.ITEMID AND A.TENANT_ID = M2.TENANT_ID
INNER JOIN TBL_Photo_ImageItem B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.ItemID = B.ItemID JOIN( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT A.ITEMID, A.TENANT_ID, A.BOARDID, MAIN_FLAG, B.FILEPATH, CONTENT, FILECONTENT, MAINCONTENT, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY A.ITEMID ORDER BY CASE WHEN B.MAIN_FLAG = 'Y' THEN 1 WHEN GUID IS NOT NULL THEN GUID + 1 ELSE 100 END ) AS SN FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_ATTACHMENTS BIT RIGHT JOIN TBL_BOARD_ITEM A ON BIT.ITEMID = A.ITEMID AND BIT.TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_PHOTO_IMAGEITEM B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.ITEMID = B.ITEMID ) A2 WHERE SN = 1 ) PART ON PART.ITEMID = A.ITEMID AND PART.TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND B.MAIN_FLAG = PART.MAIN_FLAG
WHERE
(1=1)
A.BOARDID IN (SELECT BOARDID FROM TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDGROUPID = #v_PBOARDID#)
(A.BOARDID = #v_PBOARDID# OR I.BOARDTREEPATH LIKE '%' || #v_PBOARDID# || '%')
AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND (A.WRITERCOMPANYID = #v_pCompanyID# OR TRIM(A.WRITERCOMPANYID) = '' OR A.WRITERCOMPANYID IS NULL OR TRIM(I.COMPANYID) = '' OR I.COMPANYID IS NULL)
AND (
I.BOARDID IN #v_listviewList[]#
OR (
(A.TOPWRITERID = #v_PUSERID# OR A.WRITERID = #v_PUSERID# OR EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = '1') AND I.BOARDID IN #v_qnaItemList[]#
)
)
AND STARTDATE < #nowDate# AND ENDDATE > #nowDate# AND ( (A.APPRFLAG <> 'C' AND A.APPRFLAG <> 'N') OR A.APPRFLAG IS NULL )
AND UPPER(TITLE) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_TITLE# || '%')
AND ( UPPER(A.CONTENT) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_CONTENT# || '%') OR UPPER(PART.FILECONTENT) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_CONTENT# || '%') OR UPPER(PART.MAINCONTENT) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_CONTENT# || '%') )
AND (UPPER(A.WRITERNAME) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_WRITERNAME# || '%') OR UPPER(A.WRITERNAME2) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_WRITERNAME# || '%'))
AND A.WRITEDATE > #v_SEARCH_STARTDATE#
AND A.WRITEDATE < #v_SEARCH_ENDDATE#
AND UPPER(ABSTRACT) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_ABSTRACT# || '%')
AND (UPPER(TOPWRITERID) = UPPER(#v_SEARCH_TOPWRITERID#) OR EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = '1')
AND ( I.USEKEYWORD = 'Y' AND A.ITEMID in ( SELECT DISTINCT ITEMID FROM tbl_board_boarditem_keyword BK INNER JOIN TBL_BOARD_KEYWORD K ON BK.KEYWORDID = K.KEYWORDID AND BK.TENANT_ID = K.TENANT_ID WHERE
UPPER(K.KEYWORDNAME) = UPPER(#v_KEYWORDCLICK#)
UPPER(K.KEYWORDNAME) like UPPER(CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #v_KEYWORD#), '%'))
AND BK.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ) )
AND (UPPER(TITLE) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_TITLE_AND_CONTENT# || '%') OR UPPER(CONTENT) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_TITLE_AND_CONTENT# || '%'))
AND (I.VERSIONMANAGE = 'Y' AND M2.ITEMID IS NOT NULL OR I.VERSIONMANAGE = 'N')
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_Board_Item SET UpdateDate = #updateDate#, UPDATERID = #updaterID# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ItemID = #itemID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT NVL(COUNT(*), 0) FROM TBL_Board_Like A INNER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON A.USERID = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_tenantID# AND A.ITEMID = #v_itemID#
SELECT USERID FROM TBL_Board_Like WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_tenantID# AND USERID = #v_userID# AND ITEMID = #v_itemID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_Board_Like WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_tenantID# AND USERID = #v_userID# AND ITEMID = #v_itemID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT AM.DEPTID FROM tbl_usermaster UM INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER AM ON UM.TENANT_ID = AM.TENANT_ID AND UM.CN = AM.CN AND UM.CN = #v_pUserID# INNER JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER DM ON UM.TENANT_ID = DM.TENANT_ID AND AM.DEPTID = DM.CN AND DM.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #v_pCompanyID# WHERE UM.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 FROM tbl_deptmaster WHERE CN = #v_DEPTID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT TBL_USER_JOBMASTER.JOBID FROM TBL_USER_JOBMASTER INNER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER ON (TBL_USERMASTER.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 = TBL_USER_JOBMASTER.JOBID OR TBL_USERMASTER.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8 = TBL_USER_JOBMASTER.JOBID) AND TBL_USERMASTER.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = TBL_USER_JOBMASTER.COMPANYID AND TBL_USERMASTER.TENANT_ID = TBL_USER_JOBMASTER.TENANT_ID WHERE TBL_USERMASTER.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #v_COMPANYID# AND TBL_USERMASTER.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_USERMASTER.CN = #v_USERID#
UNION
SELECT TBL_USER_JOBMASTER.JOBID FROM TBL_USER_JOBMASTER INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER ON TBL_USER_JOBMASTER.JOBID = TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.JOBID AND TBL_USER_JOBMASTER.TENANT_ID = TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID INNER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER ON TBL_USERMASTER.CN = TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.CN AND TBL_USERMASTER.TENANT_ID = TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.TENANT_ID INNER JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER ON TBL_DEPTMASTER.CN = TBL_ADDJOBMASTER.DEPTID AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.TENANT_ID = TBL_USERMASTER.TENANT_ID WHERE TBL_USER_JOBMASTER.COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# AND TBL_USERMASTER.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND TBL_USERMASTER.CN = #v_USERID#

(SELECT boardid, accessid , accessname , accessname2 , accesslevel , access_ , parentboardid , boardadmin_fg , listview_fg , read_fg , write_fg , reply_fg , delete_fg , inherit_fg , postnotice , boardgroupacl FROM TBL_BOARD_BOARDMANAGE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND boardid = #pBoardID# AND accessid = #accessID# AND (TYPE <> 'GROUP' OR TYPE IS NULL)
AND boardgroupacl = 'Y'
)
UNION
(SELECT boardid, accessid , accessname , accessname2 , accesslevel , access_ , parentboardid , boardadmin_fg , listview_fg , read_fg , write_fg , reply_fg , delete_fg , inherit_fg , postnotice , PGI.SUB_DEPT_YN AS boardgroupacl FROM TBL_BOARD_BOARDMANAGE TBB
INNER JOIN TBL_PERMISSIONGROUPLIST PGL ON TBB.TENANT_ID = PGL.TENANT_ID AND TBB.ACCESSID = PGL.GROUP_ID INNER JOIN TBL_PERMISSIONGROUPINFO PGI ON PGL.TENANT_ID = PGI.TENANT_ID AND PGL.GROUP_ID = PGI.GROUP_ID
WHERE TBB.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND boardid = #pBoardID# AND PGI.MEMBER_ID = #accessID# AND TBB.TYPE = 'GROUP'
AND PGI.SUB_DEPT_YN = 'Y'
)

(SELECT CASE WHEN (BoardAdmin_FG = 'true') THEN 'OK' ELSE 'NO' END FROM TBL_Board_BoardManage WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND AccessID = #v_pAccessID# AND (TYPE <> 'GROUP' OR TYPE IS NULL) AND
BoardID = #v_pBoardID#
BoardID = (SELECT BoardGroupID FROM TBL_Board_BoardInfo WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BoardID = #v_pBoardID#)
AND BoardGroupACL = 'Y'
)
UNION
(SELECT CASE WHEN (BoardAdmin_FG = 'true') THEN 'OK' ELSE 'NO' END FROM TBL_Board_BoardManage TBB
INNER JOIN TBL_PERMISSIONGROUPLIST PGL ON TBB.TENANT_ID = PGL.TENANT_ID AND TBB.ACCESSID = PGL.GROUP_ID INNER JOIN TBL_PERMISSIONGROUPINFO PGI ON PGL.TENANT_ID = PGI.TENANT_ID AND PGL.GROUP_ID = PGI.GROUP_ID
WHERE TBB.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND PGI.MEMBER_ID = #v_pAccessID# AND TBB.TYPE = 'GROUP' AND
TBB.BoardID = #v_pBoardID#
TBB.BoardID = (SELECT BoardGroupID FROM TBL_Board_BoardInfo WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BoardID = #v_pBoardID#)
AND PGI.SUB_DEPT_YN = 'Y'
)

select.isNotEqual:
(SELECT READ_FG FROM TBL_Board_BoardManage WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ACCESSID = #v_ACCESSID# AND (TYPE <> 'GROUP' OR TYPE IS NULL) AND BOARDID = ( SELECT BOARDID FROM TBL_Board_Item WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ITEMID = #v_ITEMID# )
AND BoardGroupACL = 'Y'
)
UNION
(SELECT READ_FG FROM TBL_Board_BoardManage TBB
INNER JOIN TBL_PERMISSIONGROUPLIST PGL ON TBB.TENANT_ID = PGL.TENANT_ID AND TBB.ACCESSID = PGL.GROUP_ID INNER JOIN TBL_PERMISSIONGROUPINFO PGI ON PGL.TENANT_ID = PGI.TENANT_ID AND PGL.GROUP_ID = PGI.GROUP_ID
WHERE TBB.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND PGI.MEMBER_ID = #v_ACCESSID# AND TBB.TYPE = 'GROUP' AND BOARDID = ( SELECT BOARDID FROM TBL_Board_Item WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ITEMID = #v_ITEMID# )
AND PGI.SUB_DEPT_YN = 'Y'
)
select.isEqual: SELECT COUNT(BOARDID) cnt FROM TBL_Board_Item_temp WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ITEMID = #v_ITEMID# AND WRITERID = #v_ACCESSID#

sqlMap.select: SELECT * FROM TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND (BOARDID = #v_BOARDID# OR BOARDTREEPATH LIKE '%' || #v_BOARDID# || '%')
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_BOARD_ITEM_READ SET ITEMID = #destItemID#, BOARDID = #destBoardID# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ITEMID = #itemID# AND BOARDID = #orgBoardID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_BOARD_ITEM_READ ( BOARDID, ITEMID, USERID, USERNAME, USERNAME2, USERDEPTNAME, USERDEPTNAME2, USERCOMPANYNAME, USERCOMPANYNAME2, USERTITLE, USERTITLE2, READDATE, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) SELECT #destBoardID#, #destItemID#, USERID, USERNAME, USERNAME2, USERDEPTNAME, USERDEPTNAME2, USERCOMPANYNAME, USERCOMPANYNAME2, USERTITLE, USERTITLE2, READDATE, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_READ WHERE BOARDID = #orgBoardID# AND ITEMID = #orgItemID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(BOARDID) FROM TBL_BOARD_MYBOARDS WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND (TRIM(COMPANYID) = #v_COMPANYID# OR TRIM(COMPANYID) = '*') AND USERID = #v_USERID# AND BOARDID = #v_BOARDID#
SELECT NVL(BOARDID, ' ') FROM TBL_BOARD_NOTICEBOARD WHERE COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
SELECT COUNT(TREEBOARDID) FROM TBL_BOARD_MYTREE WHERE TREEUPPER = #v_TREEID# AND USERID = #v_USERID# AND TREEBOARDID = #v_BOARDID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID#

SELECT A.TABID, A.BOARDID, A.BOARDNAME, A.BOARDNAME2, CASE WHEN (B.BOARDNAME3 = '' OR B.BOARDNAME3 IS NULL) THEN A.BOARDNAME ELSE B.BOARDNAME3 END BOARDNAME3, CASE WHEN (B.BOARDNAME4 = '' OR B.BOARDNAME4 IS NULL) THEN A.BOARDNAME ELSE B.BOARDNAME4 END BOARDNAME4, CASE WHEN (B.BOARDNAME6 = '' OR B.BOARDNAME6 IS NULL) THEN A.BOARDNAME ELSE B.BOARDNAME6 END BOARDNAME6 FROM TBL_BOARD_TABBOARD A INNER JOIN TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO B ON A.BOARDID = B.BOARDID WHERE (A.COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# OR TRIM(A.COMPANYID) IS NULL OR A.COMPANYID IS NULL) AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ORDER BY TABID
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_Board_OneLineReply WHERE ITEMID = #v_itemID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND (CONTENT IS NOT NULL OR IMAGECONTENT IS NOT NULL)

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY U.CN, D.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 ORDER BY U.CN) CNT, U.CN, CASE WHEN #v_PRIMARY# = '1' THEN U.DISPLAYNAME ELSE U.DISPLAYNAME2 END USERNAME, U.MAIL, U.DEPARTMENT AS DEPTID, D.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS COMPANYID, U.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 AS ROLLINFO, D.DEPTLEVEL, ('top,' || 'Top,' || D.DEPT_CD_PATH) AS DEPT_CD_PATH, CAST(U.TENANT_ID AS CHAR(1)) AS TENANT_ID FROM TBL_USERMASTER U INNER JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER D ON U.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID AND U.DEPARTMENT = D.CN WHERE
(D.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #v_COMPANYID# AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #v_COMPANYID#) AND
U.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# ) WHERE CNT = 1

SELECT DISTINCT WRITERID, CASE WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN WRITERNAME2 ELSE WRITERNAME END AS WRITERNAME, TUM.MAIL, CAST(TUM.TENANT_ID AS CHAR(1)) AS TENANT_ID FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM TBI INNER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER TUM ON TBI.TENANT_ID = TUM.TENANT_ID AND TBI.WRITERID = TUM.CN WHERE TBI.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND BOARDID = #v_BOARDID# AND ITEMID = #v_ITEMID#

(SELECT
CASE WHEN BOARDADMIN_FG = 'true' THEN 'true' ELSE 'false' END AS RESULTFG
CASE WHEN (BOARDADMIN_FG = 'true' OR (ACCESS_ = ' 1' AND LISTVIEW_FG = 'true')) THEN 'true' ELSE 'false' END AS RESULTFG
FROM TBL_BOARD_BOARDMANAGE WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ACCESSID = #v_ACCESSID# AND (TYPE <> 'GROUP' OR TYPE IS NULL) AND BOARDID = #v_BOARDID#
AND BoardGroupACL = 'Y'
)
UNION
(SELECT
CASE WHEN BOARDADMIN_FG = 'true' THEN 'true' ELSE 'false' END AS RESULTFG
CASE WHEN (BOARDADMIN_FG = 'true' OR (ACCESS_ = ' 1' AND LISTVIEW_FG = 'true')) THEN 'true' ELSE 'false' END AS RESULTFG
FROM TBL_BOARD_BOARDMANAGE TBB
INNER JOIN TBL_PERMISSIONGROUPLIST PGL ON TBB.TENANT_ID = PGL.TENANT_ID AND TBB.ACCESSID = PGL.GROUP_ID INNER JOIN TBL_PERMISSIONGROUPINFO PGI ON PGL.TENANT_ID = PGI.TENANT_ID AND PGL.GROUP_ID = PGI.GROUP_ID
WHERE TBB.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND PGI.MEMBER_ID = #v_ACCESSID# AND TBB.TYPE = 'GROUP' AND BOARDID = #v_BOARDID#
AND PGI.SUB_DEPT_YN = 'Y'
)
SELECT REACTFLAG FROM TBL_BOARD_REPLY_REACT WHERE ITEMID = #v_ITEMID# AND REPLYID = #v_REPLYID# AND USERID = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_BOARD_REPLY_REACT WHERE ITEMID = #v_ITEMID# AND REPLYID = #v_REPLYID# AND USERID = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
DELETE FROM TBL_BOARD_REPLY_REACT WHERE ITEMID = #v_ITEMID# AND REPLYID = #v_DELREPLYID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT O.ITEMID, R.REPLYID, R.USERID, R.REACTFLAG FROM TBL_BOARD_ONELINEREPLY O LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_BOARD_REPLY_REACT R ON O.ITEMID = R.ITEMID AND O.REPLYID = R.REPLYID AND O.TENANT_ID = R.TENANT_ID WHERE O.ITEMID = #v_ITEMID# AND R.USERID = #v_USERID# AND R.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_BOARD_ONELINEREPLY WHERE ITEMID = #v_ITEMID# AND REPLYID = #v_REPLYID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#

SELECT BM.USERID AS cn, U.DISPLAYNAME AS displayName, U.MAIL AS mail, BM.TENANT_ID AS tenantId, BM.COMPANYID AS companyID FROM TBL_BOARD_MYBOARDS BM INNER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER U ON BM.TENANT_ID = U.TENANT_ID AND BM.USERID = U.CN LEFT JOIN TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE R ON BM.TENANT_ID = R.TENANT_ID AND BM.USERID = R.CN LEFT JOIN TBL_USERMASTER_DELETE D ON BM.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID AND BM.USERID = D.CN WHERE BM.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND BM.boardid = #boardId# AND R.CN IS NULL AND D.CN IS NULL AND (COMPANYID = #companyId# OR COMPANYID = '*')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM WHERE ITEMID = #itemID# AND BOARDID = #boardID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT NVL(COUNT(*), 0) FROM TBL_Board_disLike A INNER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON A.USERID = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_tenantID# AND A.ITEMID = #v_itemID#
SELECT USERID FROM TBL_Board_disLike WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_tenantID# AND USERID = #v_userID# AND ITEMID = #v_itemID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_Board_disLike WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_tenantID# AND USERID = #v_userID# AND ITEMID = #v_itemID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT A.ITEMID, A.USERID, A.LIKEDATE, A.TENANT_ID, B.DISPLAYNAME, C.WRITERID, C.TITLE, B.DISPLAYNAME2, (SELECT COUNT(*) LIKELISTCOUNT FROM TBL_BOARD_LIKE D INNER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER E ON D.USERID = E.CN AND D.TENANT_ID = E.TENANT_ID WHERE ITEMID = #itemID#) AS LIKELISTCOUNT FROM (TBL_BOARD_LIKE A INNER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON A.USERID=B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID) INNER JOIN TBL_BOARD_ITEM C ON A.ITEMID=C.ITEMID WHERE A.ITEMID = #itemID#

SELECT A.ITEMID, A.USERID, A.DISLIKEDATE, A.TENANT_ID, B.DISPLAYNAME, C.WRITERID, C.TITLE, B.DISPLAYNAME2, (SELECT COUNT(*) DISLIKELISTCOUNT FROM TBL_BOARD_DISLIKE D INNER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER E ON D.USERID = E.CN AND D.TENANT_ID = E.TENANT_ID WHERE ITEMID = #itemID#) AS DISLIKELISTCOUNT FROM (TBL_BOARD_DISLIKE A INNER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON A.USERID=B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID) INNER JOIN TBL_BOARD_ITEM C ON A.ITEMID=C.ITEMID WHERE A.ITEMID = #itemID#
SELECT * FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM WHERE ITEMID = #itemID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_BOARD_ONELINEREPLY SET CONTENT = #v_CONTENT#, UPDATEDATE = TO_DATE(#v_UPDATEDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), IMAGECONTENT = #v_EMOTICON# WHERE ITEMID = #v_ITEMID# AND BOARDID = #v_BOARDID# AND REPLYID = #v_REPLYID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_BOARD_ONELINEREPLY WHERE ITEMID = #v_ITEMID# AND BOARDID = #v_BOARDID# AND PARENTREPLYID = #v_REPLYID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_BOARD_ONELINEREPLY SET USERID = NULL, USERNAME = NULL, USERNAME2 = NULL, CONTENT = NULL, UPDATEDATE = NULL, IMAGECONTENT = NULL WHERE REPLYID = #v_REPLYID# AND ITEMID = #v_ITEMID# AND BOARDID = #v_BOARDID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_BOARD_KEYWORD ( KEYWORDID, KEYWORDNAME, TENANT_ID ) SELECT TBL_BOARD_KEYWORD_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #v_keyword#, #v_tenantID# FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT KEYWORDID FROM TBL_BOARD_KEYWORD WHERE KEYWORDNAME = #v_keyword# AND TENANT_ID = #v_tenantID# )

INSERT INTO TBL_BOARD_BOARDITEM_KEYWORD ( KEYWORDID, BOARDID, ITEMID, TENANT_ID, SN )
SELECT #[].keywordId#, #[].boardId#, #[].itemId#, #[].tenant_id#, #[].sn# FROM DUAL
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_BOARD_BOARDITEM_KEYWORD WHERE BOARDID = #v_boardID# AND ITEMID = #v_itemID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT KEYWORDID, KEYWORDNAME, #v_boardID# as BOARDID, #v_itemID# as ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_BOARD_KEYWORD WHERE KEYWORDNAME IN ( #v_keywords[]# ) AND TENANT_ID = #v_tenantID#

SELECT K.* FROM TBL_BOARD_KEYWORD K INNER JOIN TBL_BOARD_BOARDITEM_KEYWORD BK ON K.KEYWORDID = BK.KEYWORDID AND K.TENANT_ID = BK.TENANT_ID WHERE 1 = 1
AND BK.ITEMID = #v_itemID#
AND BK.BOARDID = #v_boardID#
AND K.TENANT_ID = #v_tenantID# ORDER BY SN

SELECT COUNT(A.ITEMID) CNT FROM TBL_Board_Item A INNER JOIN TBL_Board_BoardInfo P ON A.TENANT_ID = P.TENANT_ID AND A.BOARDID = P.BOARDID LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER( PARTITION BY PARENTITEMID ORDER BY VERSION DESC ) RN, ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_BOARD_MODIFYHISTORY ) M1 WHERE M1.RN = 1 ) M2 ON A.ITEMID = M2.ITEMID AND A.TENANT_ID = M2.TENANT_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND (A.WRITERCOMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# OR TRIM(A.WRITERCOMPANYID) = '' OR A.WRITERCOMPANYID IS NULL OR TRIM(P.COMPANYID) = '' OR P.COMPANYID IS NULL) AND (A.APPRFLAG = 'Y' OR A.APPRFLAG IS NULL) AND A.STARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND A.ENDDATE > #nowDate# AND P.GUBUN != '5' AND (P.VERSIONMANAGE = 'Y' AND M2.ITEMID IS NOT NULL OR P.VERSIONMANAGE = 'N')

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT Row_Number() OVER ( ORDER BY P.BOARDNAME A.ITEMID A.WRITERNAME A.WRITERDEPTNAME A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME A.WRITEDATE A.STARTDATE TO_NUMBER(A.PARENTWRITEDATE) A.TITLE A.ATTACHMENTS A.READCOUNT A.DOCNO DESC ) AS RNUM, A.BOARDID, P.BOARDNAME, A.ITEMID, A.WRITERID, A.WRITERNAME, A.WRITERDEPTNAME, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME, A.WRITEDATE, A.STARTDATE, A.PARENTWRITEDATE, A.IMPORTANCE, A.TITLE, A.ATTACHMENTS, EXT, FILEPATH, A.READCOUNT, A.ITEMLEVEL, A.ABSTRACT, P.BOARDNAME2 AS BOARDNAME2, A.WRITERNAME2, A.WRITERDEPTNAME2, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME2, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_Board_OneLineReply WHERE TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND ITEMID = A.ItemID) ONELINECNT, A.UPPERITEMIDTREE, A.DOCNO, '' AS NOTICE, P.GUBUN, A.MAINCONTENT, P.BOARDGROUPID FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM A INNER JOIN TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO P ON A.TENANT_ID = P.TENANT_ID AND (A.WRITERCOMPANYID = P.COMPANYID OR TRIM(A.WRITERCOMPANYID) = '' OR A.WRITERCOMPANYID IS NULL OR TRIM(P.COMPANYID) = '' OR P.COMPANYID IS NULL) AND A.BOARDID = P.BOARDID LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER( PARTITION BY PARENTITEMID ORDER BY VERSION DESC ) RN, ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_BOARD_MODIFYHISTORY ) M1 WHERE M1.RN = 1 ) M2 ON A.ITEMID = M2.ITEMID LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 0 THEN 'NONE' WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 1 THEN MAX(TO_CHAR(FILENAME)) ELSE 'MANY' END AS EXT, CASE WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 0 THEN 'NONE' WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 1 THEN MAX(TO_CHAR(FILEPATH)) ELSE 'MANY' END AS FILEPATH, TENANT_ID, itemid FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_ATTACHMENTS GROUP BY ITEMID, TENANT_ID ) F ON A.ITEMID = F.ITEMID AND A.TENANT_ID = F.TENANT_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND P.GUBUN != '5' AND (A.WRITERCOMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# OR TRIM(A.WRITERCOMPANYID) = '' OR A.WRITERCOMPANYID IS NULL OR TRIM(P.COMPANYID) = '' OR P.COMPANYID IS NULL)
AND (A.APPRFLAG = 'Y' OR A.APPRFLAG IS NULL) AND A.STARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND A.ENDDATE > #nowDate# AND (P.VERSIONMANAGE = 'Y' AND M2.ITEMID IS NOT NULL OR P.VERSIONMANAGE = 'N') ) T1 WHERE RNUM <= #v_PENDROW# ) T2 WHERE RNUM >= #v_PSTARTROW#
SELECT CONTENTLOCATION FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM WHERE ITEMID = #itemID# AND BOARDID = #boardID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_BOARDITEM_SCRAP A INNER JOIN TBL_BOARD_ITEM E ON A.BOARDID = E.BOARDID AND A.ITEMID = E.ITEMID WHERE A.USERID = #v_userID# AND A.ITEMID = #v_itemID# AND A.BOARDID = #v_boardID# AND A.COMPANYID = #v_companyID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_tenantID#

DELETE FROM TBL_BOARDITEM_SCRAP WHERE ITEMID = #v_itemID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_tenantID# AND USERID = #v_userID# AND BOARDID = #v_boardID# AND COMPANYID = #v_companyID#

A.WRITERDEPTNAME A.WRITERNAME
A.WRITERDEPTNAME2 A.WRITERNAME2
A.WRITEDATE A.READCOUNT DESC ) AS ROWNUM_,
A.BOARDID, A.ITEMID, A.WRITERID, A.WRITERNAME, A.WRITERDEPTNAME, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME, A.STARTDATE, A.WRITEDATE, A.PARENTWRITEDATE, A.IMPORTANCE, A.TITLE, A.READCOUNT, A.ATTACHMENTS, EXT, FILEPATH, A.ITEMLEVEL, A.ABSTRACT, CASE WHEN D.TOTALCOUNT IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE '1' END READFLAG, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5, A.WRITERNAME2, A.WRITERDEPTNAME2, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME2, B.ATTRIBUTEYN, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_Board_OneLineReply WHERE TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND ITEMID = A.ItemID) ONELINECNT , A.UPPERITEMIDTREE, A.DOCNO, CASE WHEN ( (CASE WHEN #lang# = '1' THEN BOARDNAME WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN BOARDNAME2 WHEN #lang# = '3' THEN BOARDNAME3 WHEN #lang# = '4' THEN BOARDNAME4 WHEN #lang# = '6' THEN BOARDNAME6 ELSE BOARDNAME END) = '' OR (CASE WHEN #lang# = '1' THEN BOARDNAME WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN BOARDNAME2 WHEN #lang# = '3' THEN BOARDNAME3 WHEN #lang# = '4' THEN BOARDNAME4 WHEN #lang# = '6' THEN BOARDNAME6 ELSE BOARDNAME END) IS NULL ) THEN B.BOARDNAME ELSE (CASE WHEN #lang# = '1' THEN BOARDNAME WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN BOARDNAME2 WHEN #lang# = '3' THEN BOARDNAME3 WHEN #lang# = '4' THEN BOARDNAME4 WHEN #lang# = '6' THEN BOARDNAME6 ELSE BOARDNAME END) END BOARDNAME, B.GUBUN AS GUBUN, '' AS NOTICE, A.APPRFLAG AS APPRFLAG, A.PUBLICFLAG FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM A INNER JOIN TBL_BOARDITEM_SCRAP E ON A.BOARDID = E.BOARDID AND A.ITEMID = E.ITEMID INNER JOIN TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.BoardID = B.BoardID LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(USERID) AS TOTALCOUNT, ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_READ WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND USERID = #v_PUSERID# GROUP BY ITEMID, TENANT_ID ) D ON A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID AND A.ITEMID = D.ITEMID LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 0 THEN 'NONE' WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 1 THEN MAX(TO_CHAR(FILENAME)) ELSE 'MANY' END AS EXT, CASE WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 0 THEN 'NONE' WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 1 THEN MAX(TO_CHAR(FILEPATH)) ELSE 'MANY' END AS FILEPATH, TENANT_ID, itemid FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_ATTACHMENTS GROUP BY ITEMID, TENANT_ID ) F ON A.ITEMID = F.ITEMID AND A.TENANT_ID = F.TENANT_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND E.USERID = #v_PUSERID# AND (A.WritercompanyID = #v_COMPANYID# OR TRIM(B.COMPANYID) = #v_COMPANYID# OR TRIM(B.COMPANYID) = '' OR B.COMPANYID IS NULL) AND A.STARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND A.ENDDATE > #nowDate# AND ( (A.APPRFLAG <> 'C' AND A.APPRFLAG <> 'N') OR A.APPRFLAG IS NULL )
AND E.BOARDID IN #scrapBoardListView_FG[]#
AND 1 = 0
) T1 WHERE ROWNUM_ <= #v_PENDROW# ) T2 WHERE ROWNUM_ >= #v_PSTARTROW#

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_Board_Item A INNER JOIN TBL_BOARDITEM_SCRAP B ON A.BOARDID = B.BOARDID AND A.ITEMID = B.ITEMID WHERE B.USERID = #v_userID# AND B.COMPANYID = #v_companyID# AND B.TENANT_ID = #v_tenantID# AND A.STARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND A.ENDDATE > #nowDate# AND ( (A.APPRFLAG <> 'C' AND A.APPRFLAG <> 'N') OR A.APPRFLAG IS NULL )
AND B.BOARDID IN #scrapBoardListView_FG[]#
AND 1 = 0

SELECT COUNT(A.ITEMID) FROM TBL_Board_Item A INNER JOIN TBL_BOARDITEM_SCRAP B ON A.BOARDID = B.BOARDID AND A.ITEMID = B.ITEMID WHERE B.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND B.USERID = #v_PUSERID# AND B.COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# AND A.STARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND A.ENDDATE > #nowDate# AND ( (A.APPRFLAG <> 'C' AND A.APPRFLAG <> 'N') OR A.APPRFLAG IS NULL )
AND B.BOARDID IN #scrapBoardListView_FG[]#
AND 1 = 0
AND UPPER(A.TITLE) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_TITLE# || '%')
AND (UPPER(A.WRITERNAME) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_WRITERNAME# || '%') OR UPPER(A.WRITERNAME2) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_WRITERNAME# || '%'))
AND (UPPER(TITLE) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_TITLE_AND_CONTENT# || '%') OR UPPER(CONTENT) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_TITLE_AND_CONTENT# || '%'))

A.WRITERDEPTNAME A.WRITERNAME
A.WRITERDEPTNAME2 A.WRITERNAME2

FROM TBL_Board_OneLineReply WHERE TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND ITEMID = A.ItemID) ONELINECNT, A.UPPERITEMIDTREE, A.DOCNO, '' AS NOTICE, CASE WHEN ( (CASE WHEN #lang# = '1' THEN I.BOARDNAME WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN I.BOARDNAME2 WHEN #lang# = '3' THEN I.BOARDNAME3 WHEN #lang# = '4' THEN I.BOARDNAME4 WHEN #lang# = '6' THEN I.BOARDNAME6 ELSE I.BOARDNAME END) = '' OR (CASE WHEN #lang# = '1' THEN I.BOARDNAME WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN I.BOARDNAME2 WHEN #lang# = '3' THEN I.BOARDNAME3 WHEN #lang# = '4' THEN I.BOARDNAME4 WHEN #lang# = '6' THEN I.BOARDNAME6 ELSE I.BOARDNAME END) IS NULL ) THEN I.BOARDNAME6 ELSE I.BOARDNAME END) END BOARDNAME, I.GUBUN AS GUBUN, A.APPRFLAG AS APPRFLAG, A.PUBLICFLAG FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM A INNER JOIN TBL_BOARDITEM_SCRAP S ON A.BOARDID = S.BOARDID AND A.ITEMID = S.ITEMID LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(USERID) AS TOTALCOUNT, ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_READ WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND USERID = #v_PUSERID# GROUP BY ITEMID, TENANT_ID) D ON A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID AND A.ITEMID = D.ITEMID INNER JOIN TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO I ON A.TENANT_ID = I.TENANT_ID AND A.BOARDID = I.BOARDID LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 0 THEN 'NONE' WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 1 THEN MAX(TO_CHAR(FILENAME)) ELSE 'MANY' END AS EXT, CASE WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 0 THEN 'NONE' WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 1 THEN MAX(TO_CHAR(FILEPATH)) ELSE 'MANY' END AS FILEPATH, TENANT_ID, itemid FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_ATTACHMENTS GROUP BY ITEMID, TENANT_ID ) F ON A.ITEMID = F.ITEMID AND A.TENANT_ID = F.TENANT_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND S.USERID = SELECT USERSCRAPCONTID , USERSCRAPCONTNAME , DESCRIPTION FROM TBL_USERSCRAPCONT WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# AND PARENTSCRAPCONTID = #v_ParentScrapContID# AND USERID = #v_USERID# ORDER BY USERSCRAPCONTNAME
SELECT SUBSTR(CONCAT('0000000000' , ((CASE WHEN MAX(USERSCRAPCONTID) IS NULL THEN '0000000000' ELSE MAX(USERSCRAPCONTID) END) + 1 )), -10, 10) FROM TBL_USERSCRAPCONT WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_USERSCRAPCONT ( USERSCRAPCONTID, USERSCRAPCONTNAME, PARENTSCRAPCONTID, DESCRIPTION, USERID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) VALUES ( #v_PMAXSCRAPCONTAINERID#, #v_USERSCRAPCONTNAME#, #v_PARENTSCRAPCONTID#, #v_DESCRIPTION#, #v_USERID#, #v_TENANTID#, #companyID# )
sqlMap.select: SELECT USERSCRAPCONTID , USERSCRAPCONTNAME FROM TBl_USERSCRAPCONT WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND PARENTSCRAPCONTID = #v_USERSCRAPCONTID# ORDER BY USERSCRAPCONTID
sqlMap.update:
UPDATE TBL_USERSCRAPCONT SET DESCRIPTION = #v_PDESCRIPTION#
, USERID = #v_POWNUSERID#
, USERSCRAPCONTNAME = #v_PUSERSCRAPCONTNAME#
, PARENTSCRAPCONTID = #v_PPARENTSCRAPCONTID#
WHERE USERSCRAPCONTID = #v_PSCRAPCONTID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_USERSCRAPCONT WHERE PARENTSCRAPCONTID = #v_PSCRAPCONTID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
SELECT COUNT(ITEMID) FROM TBL_USERSCRAPCONTLIST WHERE USERSCRAPCONTID = #v_PSCRAPCONTID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_USERSCRAPCONTLIST WHERE USERSCRAPCONTID = #v_PSCRAPCONTID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
DELETE FROM TBL_USERSCRAPCONT WHERE USERSCRAPCONTID = #v_PSCRAPCONTID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(ITEMID) FROM TBL_USERSCRAPCONTLIST WHERE ITEMID = #itemID# AND BOARDID = #boardID# AND USERID = #userID# AND USERSCRAPCONTID = #userScrapContID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
sqlMap.insert: MERGE INTO TBL_USERSCRAPCONTLIST USING dual ON (ITEMID = #itemID# AND USERID = #userID# AND USERSCRAPCONTID = #userScrapContID#) WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( BOARDID, ITEMID, USERID, USERSCRAPCONTID, DESCRIPTION, SCRAPDATE, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) VALUES ( #boardID#, #itemID#, #userID#, #userScrapContID#, #description#, #scrapDate#, #tenantID#, #companyID# )
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_UserScrapContList WHERE ITEMID = #ItemID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenant_ID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND USERID = #userID# AND USERSCRAPCONTID = #scrapContID#
