A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID AND A.ITEMID = D.ITEMID INNER JOIN TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO I ON A.TENANT_ID = I.TENANT_ID AND A.BOARDID = I.BOARDID LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 0 THEN 'NONE' WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 1 THEN MAX(TO_CHAR(FILENAME)) ELSE 'MANY' END AS EXT, CASE WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 0 THEN 'NONE' WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 1 THEN MAX(TO_CHAR(FILEPATH)) ELSE 'MANY' END AS FILEPATH, TENANT_ID, itemid FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_ATTACHMENTS GROUP BY ITEMID, TENANT_ID ) F ON A.ITEMID = F.ITEMID AND A.TENANT_ID = F.TENANT_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND S.USERID = #v_PUSERID# AND S.USERSCRAPCONTID = #v_SCRAPCONTID# AND (A.WritercompanyID = #v_COMPANYID# OR TRIM(I.COMPANYID) = #v_COMPANYID# OR TRIM(I.COMPANYID) = '' OR I.COMPANYID IS NULL) AND A.STARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND A.ENDDATE > #nowDate# AND ( (A.APPRFLAG <> 'C' AND A.APPRFLAG <> 'N') OR A.APPRFLAG IS NULL )
AND S.BOARDID IN #scrapContBoardListView_FG[]#
AND 1 = 0
AND UPPER(A.TITLE) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_TITLE# || '%')
AND (UPPER(A.WRITERNAME) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_WRITERNAME# || '%') OR UPPER(A.WRITERNAME2) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_WRITERNAME# || '%'))
AND (UPPER(TITLE) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_TITLE_AND_CONTENT# || '%') OR UPPER(CONTENT) like UPPER('%' || #v_SEARCH_TITLE_AND_CONTENT# || '%'))
) T1 WHERE ROWNUM_ <= #v_PENDROW# ) T2 WHERE ROWNUM_ >= #v_PSTARTROW#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_USERSCRAPCONTLIST WHERE ITEMID = #itemID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(ITEMID) FROM TBL_USERSCRAPCONTLIST WHERE ITEMID = #itemID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT DISTINCT BOARDID FROM TBL_BOARDITEM_SCRAP WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND USERID = #v_PUSERID#
SELECT DISTINCT BOARDID FROM TBL_USERSCRAPCONTLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND USERID = #v_PUSERID# AND USERSCRAPCONTID = #v_CONTID#
sqlMap.delete:
DELETE FROM TBL_BOARD_COMMENT_ATTACHMENTS WHERE ITEMID = #v_ITEMID#
AND REPLYID = #v_REPLYID#
AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_BOARD_COMMENT_ATTACHMENTS SET ITEMID = #destItemID# WHERE ITEMID = #orgItemID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT * FROM (SELECT T1.*, rownum as RN FROM (SELECT IMAGEID , FILEPATH , FILECONTENT , MAIN_FLAG FLAG , IMAGENAME , ADDTHUMBNAIL , THUMBNAILEXT FROM TBL_Photo_ImageItem WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ItemID = #v_pItemID# AND BoardID = #v_pBoardID# ORDER BY IMAGEID ASC ) T1 )
WHERE RN <= #v_pEndRow# AND RN >= #v_pStartRow#
sqlMap.update:
UPDATE TBL_Photo_ImageItem SET ThumbnailExt = #v_pExt#, ImageName = #v_pOFileName#, WriteDate = #nowDate#
, AddThumbnail = #v_AddThumbnail#
WHERE tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND ImageID = #v_pImageID# AND BoardID = #v_pBoardID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(A.ITEMID) CNT FROM TBL_Board_Item A INNER JOIN TBL_Board_BoardInfo P ON A.TENANT_ID = P.TENANT_ID AND A.BOARDID = P.BOARDID LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER( PARTITION BY PARENTITEMID ORDER BY VERSION DESC ) RN, ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_BOARD_MODIFYHISTORY ) M1 WHERE M1.RN = 1 ) M2 ON A.ITEMID = M2.ITEMID AND A.TENANT_ID = M2.TENANT_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND P.GUBUN != '5' AND (A.WRITERCOMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# OR TRIM(A.WRITERCOMPANYID) = '' OR A.WRITERCOMPANYID IS NULL OR TRIM(P.COMPANYID) = '' OR P.COMPANYID IS NULL) AND (A.APPRFLAG = 'Y' OR A.APPRFLAG IS NULL) AND A.STARTDATE > TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#nowDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') - NVL((SELECT ALLNEWBOARDLISTDATE FROM TBL_BOARD_CONFIGURATION WHERE userid = #v_pUserID# AND tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#), 5) , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND A.STARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND A.ENDDATE > #nowDate# AND P.ALLNEWBOARDFLAG = 'Y' AND (P.VERSIONMANAGE = 'Y' AND M2.ITEMID IS NOT NULL OR P.VERSIONMANAGE = 'N')

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT Row_Number() OVER ( ORDER BY P.BOARDNAME A.ITEMID A.WRITERNAME A.WRITERDEPTNAME A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME A.WRITEDATE A.STARTDATE TO_NUMBER(A.PARENTWRITEDATE) A.TITLE A.ATTACHMENTS A.READCOUNT A.DOCNO DESC ) AS RNUM, A.BOARDID, P.BOARDNAME, A.ITEMID, A.WRITERID, A.WRITERNAME, A.WRITERDEPTNAME, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME, A.WRITEDATE, A.STARTDATE, A.PARENTWRITEDATE, A.IMPORTANCE, A.TITLE, A.ATTACHMENTS, EXT, FILEPATH, A.READCOUNT, A.ITEMLEVEL, A.ABSTRACT, P.BOARDNAME2 AS BOARDNAME2, A.WRITERNAME2, A.WRITERDEPTNAME2, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME2, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_Board_OneLineReply WHERE TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND ITEMID = A.ItemID) ONELINECNT, A.UPPERITEMIDTREE, A.DOCNO, '' AS NOTICE, P.GUBUN, A.MAINCONTENT, P.BOARDGROUPID FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM A INNER JOIN TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO P ON A.TENANT_ID = P.TENANT_ID AND (A.WRITERCOMPANYID = P.COMPANYID OR TRIM(A.WRITERCOMPANYID) = '' OR A.WRITERCOMPANYID IS NULL OR TRIM(P.COMPANYID) = '' OR P.COMPANYID IS NULL) AND A.BOARDID = P.BOARDID LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER( PARTITION BY PARENTITEMID ORDER BY VERSION DESC ) RN, ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_BOARD_MODIFYHISTORY ) M1 WHERE M1.RN = 1 ) M2 ON A.ITEMID = M2.ITEMID AND A.TENANT_ID = M2.TENANT_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 0 THEN 'NONE' WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 1 THEN MAX(TO_CHAR(FILENAME)) ELSE 'MANY' END AS EXT, CASE WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 0 THEN 'NONE' WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 1 THEN MAX(TO_CHAR(FILEPATH)) ELSE 'MANY' END AS FILEPATH, TENANT_ID, itemid FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_ATTACHMENTS GROUP BY ITEMID, TENANT_ID ) F ON A.ITEMID = F.ITEMID AND A.TENANT_ID = F.TENANT_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND (A.WRITERCOMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# OR TRIM(A.WRITERCOMPANYID) = '' OR A.WRITERCOMPANYID IS NULL OR TRIM(P.COMPANYID) = '' OR P.COMPANYID IS NULL)
AND P.GUBUN != '5' AND (A.APPRFLAG = 'Y' OR A.APPRFLAG IS NULL) AND A.STARTDATE > TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#nowDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') - NVL((SELECT ALLNEWBOARDLISTDATE FROM TBL_BOARD_CONFIGURATION WHERE USERID = #v_PUSERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#), 5) , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND A.STARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND A.ENDDATE > #nowDate# AND (P.VERSIONMANAGE = 'Y' AND M2.ITEMID IS NOT NULL OR P.VERSIONMANAGE = 'N') AND P.ALLNEWBOARDFLAG = 'Y' ) T1 WHERE RNUM <= #v_PENDROW# ) T2 WHERE RNUM >= #v_PSTARTROW#

SELECT TO_CHAR(MEALDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS MEALDATE, NVL(ACOURSE, '') AS ACOURSE, NVL(BCOURSE, '') AS BCOURSE, NVL(SALADBAR, '') AS SALADBAR, NVL(DESSERT, '') AS DESSERT, NVL(TOTALCAL, '') AS TOTALCAL FROM TBL_MEAL_PLAN WHERE MEALDATE BETWEEN to_date(#startDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND to_date(#startDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 4 AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY MEALDATE ASC
sqlMap.insert: MERGE INTO TBL_MEAL_PLAN target USING ( SELECT #mealDate# AS MEALDATE, #aCourse# AS ACOURSE, #bCourse# AS BCOURSE, #saladBar# AS SALADBAR, #dessert# AS DESSERT, #totalCal# AS TOTALCAL, #companyID# AS COMPANYID, #tenantID# AS TENANT_ID FROM dual) source ON (target.MEALDATE = source.MEALDATE AND target.COMPANYID = source.COMPANYID AND target.TENANT_ID = source.TENANT_ID) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET target.ACOURSE = source.ACOURSE, target.BCOURSE = source.BCOURSE, target.SALADBAR = source.SALADBAR, target.DESSERT = source.DESSERT, target.TOTALCAL = source.TOTALCAL WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (MEALDATE, ACOURSE, BCOURSE, SALADBAR, DESSERT, TOTALCAL, COMPANYID, TENANT_ID) VALUES (source.MEALDATE, source.ACOURSE, source.BCOURSE, source.SALADBAR, source.DESSERT, source.TOTALCAL, source.COMPANYID, source.TENANT_ID)
sqlMap.select: SELECT TO_CHAR(MEALDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS MEALDATE, NVL(ACOURSE, '') AS ACOURSE, NVL(BCOURSE, '') AS BCOURSE, NVL(SALADBAR, '') AS SALADBAR, NVL(DESSERT, '') AS DESSERT, NVL(TOTALCAL, '') AS TOTALCAL FROM TBL_MEAL_PLAN WHERE MEALDATE = TO_DATE(#date#, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY MEALDATE ASC
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_BOARD_ITEM_RATING SET RATING = #v_RATING#, RATINGDATE = #v_RATINGDATE# WHERE ITEMID = #v_ITEMID# AND USERID = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID#

UPDATE TBL_BOARD_ITEM_RATING_SUMMARY SET TOTALRATERS = #v_TOTALRATERS#, TOTALSCORE = #v_TOTALSCORE#, AVERAGESCORE = #v_AVERAGESCORE# WHERE ITEMID = #v_ITEMID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_RATING WHERE ITEMID = #v_ITEMID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
DELETE FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_RATING_SUMMARY WHERE ITEMID = #v_ITEMID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT R.RATING, S.TOTALSCORE, S.AVERAGESCORE, S.TOTALRATERS FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_RATING_SUMMARY S LEFT JOIN TBL_BOARD_ITEM_RATING R ON R.ITEMID = S.ITEMID AND R.TENANT_ID = S.TENANT_ID AND R.USERID = #v_USERID# WHERE S.ITEMID = #v_ITEMID# AND S.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
SELECT CONCAT(LISTAGG(FILENAME, '|') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY GUID), '|') AS FILENAME FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_ATTACHMENTS WHERE ITEMID = #itemID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenant_id#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_Board_Item SET UPDATERID = #userID#, UpdateDate = #updateDate#, DOCNO = ( SELECT CASE WHEN MAX(DOCNO) IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE MAX(DOCNO) + 1 END FROM TBL_Board_Item WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND BOARDID = #boardID# ), PARENTWRITEDATE = ( SELECT CASE WHEN MAX(DOCNO) IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE MAX(DOCNO) + 1 END FROM TBL_Board_Item WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND BOARDID = #boardID# ) WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ItemID = #itemID# AND BOARDID = #boardID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT ITEMID, TITLE, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(WRITEDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + INTERVAL '9' HOUR, 'YYYY/MM/DD') AS WRITEDATE, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(UPDATEDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + INTERVAL '9' HOUR, 'YYYY/MM/DD') AS UPDATEDATE FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM WHERE UPPERITEMIDTREE LIKE (#itemID# || '%') AND ITEMLEVEL > 1 AND BOARDID = #boardID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY WRITEDATE
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_Board_Item SET PARENTWRITEDATE = ( SELECT PARENTWRITEDATE FROM TBL_Board_Item WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND BOARDID = #boardID# AND ITEMID = #itemID# ) WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ItemID = #replyItemID# AND BOARDID = #boardID#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT A.BOARDID, B.ITEMID, B.WRITERID, B.CONTENTLOCATION AS FILEPATH, C.FILEPATH AS ATTACHFILEPATH, C.FILENAME AS ATTACHFILENAME FROM TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO A JOIN TBL_BOARD_ITEM B ON A.BOARDID = B.BOARDID JOIN TBL_BOARD_ITEM_ATTACHMENTS C ON B.ITEMID = C.ITEMID
JOIN ( SELECT ITEMID FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER( ORDER BY VERSION DESC ) RN, ITEMID FROM TBL_BOARD_MODIFYHISTORY WHERE ITEMID IN ( SELECT ITEMID FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM WHERE BOARDID = #boardID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) ) M WHERE M.RN = 1 ) D ON B.ITEMID = D.ITEMID
WHERE A.BOARDID = #boardID# AND (A.COMPANYID = #companyID# OR A.COMPANYID IS NULL) AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND C.GUID = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM WHERE BOARDID = #boardID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT DISTINCT PARENTITEMID FROM TBL_BOARD_MODIFYHISTORY A JOIN TBL_BOARD_ITEM B ON A.ITEMID = B.ITEMID WHERE B.BOARDID = #boardID# AND B.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT * FROM TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO A JOIN TBL_BOARD_ITEM B ON A.BOARDID = B.BOARDID JOIN TBL_BOARD_MODIFYHISTORY C ON B.ITEMID = C.ITEMID WHERE A.BOARDID = #boardID# AND C.PARENTITEMID IN ( SELECT PARENTITEMID FROM TBL_BOARD_MODIFYHISTORY WHERE ITEMID = #itemID# ) AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY VERSION DESC
SELECT VERSIONMANAGE FROM TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO WHERE BOARDID = #boardID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT VERSION FROM TBL_BOARD_MODIFYHISTORY WHERE PARENTITEMID = ( SELECT PARENTITEMID FROM TBL_BOARD_MODIFYHISTORY WHERE ITEMID = #itemID# ) AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY VERSION DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_BOARD_MODIFYHISTORY ( ITEMID, PARENTITEMID, VERSION, MODIFYUSERID, MODIFYUSERNAME, MODIFIEDDATE, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #itemID#, #parentItemID#, #version#, #writerID#, #writerName#, TO_DATE(#writeDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), #tenantID# )
sqlMap.select: SELECT PARENTITEMID FROM TBL_BOARD_MODIFYHISTORY WHERE ITEMID = #itemID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM WHERE ITEMID IN ( SELECT ITEMID FROM TBL_BOARD_MODIFYHISTORY WHERE PARENTITEMID = ( SELECT PARENTITEMID FROM TBL_BOARD_MODIFYHISTORY WHERE ITEMID = #itemID# ) ) AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

DELETE FROM TBL_Board_OneLineReply WHERE ITEMID IN ( SELECT ITEMID FROM TBL_BOARD_MODIFYHISTORY WHERE PARENTITEMID = ( SELECT PARENTITEMID FROM TBL_BOARD_MODIFYHISTORY WHERE ITEMID = #itemID# ) ) AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

DELETE FROM TBL_Board_Item_Read WHERE ITEMID IN ( SELECT ITEMID FROM TBL_BOARD_MODIFYHISTORY WHERE PARENTITEMID = ( SELECT PARENTITEMID FROM TBL_BOARD_MODIFYHISTORY WHERE ITEMID = #itemID# ) ) AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT CONTENTLOCATION FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM WHERE ITEMID IN ( SELECT ITEMID FROM TBL_BOARD_MODIFYHISTORY WHERE PARENTITEMID = ( SELECT PARENTITEMID FROM TBL_BOARD_MODIFYHISTORY WHERE ITEMID = #itemID# ) ) AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

WITH TMP AS ( SELECT PARENTITEMID FROM TBL_BOARD_MODIFYHISTORY WHERE ITEMID = #itemID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# )
SELECT A.VERSION FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER( ORDER BY VERSION DESC ) RN, TBL_BOARD_MODIFYHISTORY.VERSION FROM TBL_BOARD_MODIFYHISTORY WHERE PARENTITEMID = ( SELECT * FROM TMP ) ) A WHERE A.RN = 1
SELECT TITLE FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM WHERE BOARDID = #boardID# AND ITEMID = #itemID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TBL_BOARD_BOARDMANAGE WHERE BOARDID =
#boardID#
(SELECT BOARDID FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM WHERE ITEMID = #itemID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#)
AND TYPE = 'GUEST' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

WITH TB1 as ( SELECT 1 AS PRIORITY, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY NOTINO ASC, PARENTWRITEDATE DESC, WRITEDATE DESC) as IN_SEQ, ITEMID, TITLE, WRITERNAME, (TO_DATE(WRITEDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + NUMTODSINTERVAL(#offset#, 'MINUTE')) as WRITEDATE, ITEMLEVEL, '1' AS NOTICE, PARENTWRITEDATE, UPPERITEMIDTREE FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM WHERE BOARDID = #boardID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND (TO_DATE(#nowDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') BETWEEN TO_DATE(NTSTARTDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND TO_DATE(NTENDDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')) UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS PRIORITY, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(PARENTWRITEDATE) DESC, WRITEDATE DESC, DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(UPPERITEMIDTREE, 1000, 1)) AS IN_SEQ, ITEMID, TITLE, WRITERNAME, (TO_DATE(WRITEDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + NUMTODSINTERVAL(#offset#, 'MINUTE')) AS WRITEDATE, ITEMLEVEL, CASE WHEN TO_DATE(#nowDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') BETWEEN TO_DATE(NTSTARTDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND TO_DATE(NTENDDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') THEN '1' ELSE '0' END AS NOTICE, PARENTWRITEDATE, UPPERITEMIDTREE FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM WHERE BOARDID = #boardID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ), TB2 as ( SELECT TB1.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ITEMID ORDER BY PRIORITY) AS CNT FROM TB1 ) SELECT ITEMID, TITLE, WRITERNAME, WRITEDATE, ITEMLEVEL, NOTICE FROM ( SELECT ITEMID, TITLE, WRITERNAME, WRITEDATE, ITEMLEVEL, NOTICE, PRIORITY, IN_SEQ FROM TB2 WHERE CNT = 1 ORDER BY PRIORITY, IN_SEQ ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5
SELECT ITEMID FROM TBL_Board_Item WHERE tenant_id = #v_TENANTID# AND TO_CHAR(UpperItemIDTree) LIKE '%' || #v_pItemID# || '%' AND ItemID <> #v_pItemID# AND APPRFLAG IN ('N', 'C')
sqlMap.delete:
DELETE FROM TBL_BOARD_MODIFYHISTORY WHERE
PARENTITEMID = (SELECT PARENTITEMID FROM TBL_BOARD_MODIFYHISTORY WHERE ITEMID = #itemID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#)
ITEMID = #itemID#
AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT COUNT(A.ITEMID) CNT FROM TBL_Board_Item A INNER JOIN TBL_Board_BoardInfo P ON A.TENANT_ID = P.TENANT_ID AND A.BOARDID = P.BOARDID LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER( PARTITION BY PARENTITEMID ORDER BY VERSION DESC ) RN, ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_BOARD_MODIFYHISTORY ) M1 WHERE M1.RN = 1 ) M2 ON A.ITEMID = M2.ITEMID AND A.TENANT_ID = M2.TENANT_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND (A.WRITERCOMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# OR TRIM(A.WRITERCOMPANYID) = '' OR A.WRITERCOMPANYID IS NULL OR TRIM(P.COMPANYID) = '' OR P.COMPANYID IS NULL) AND (A.APPRFLAG = 'Y' OR A.APPRFLAG IS NULL) AND A.STARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND A.ENDDATE > #nowDate# AND P.GUBUN != '5' AND (P.VERSIONMANAGE = 'Y' AND M2.ITEMID IS NOT NULL OR P.VERSIONMANAGE = 'N') AND P.PARENTBOARDID = #boardID#
AND P.BOARDID IN
#childBoardIDs[]#

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT Row_Number() OVER ( ORDER BY P.BOARDNAME A.ITEMID A.WRITERNAME A.WRITERDEPTNAME A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME A.WRITEDATE A.STARTDATE TO_NUMBER(A.PARENTWRITEDATE) A.TITLE A.ATTACHMENTS A.READCOUNT A.DOCNO DESC ) AS RNUM, A.BOARDID, P.BOARDNAME, A.ITEMID, A.WRITERID, A.WRITERNAME, A.WRITERDEPTNAME, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME, A.WRITEDATE, A.STARTDATE, A.PARENTWRITEDATE, A.IMPORTANCE, A.TITLE, A.ATTACHMENTS, EXT, FILEPATH, A.READCOUNT, A.ITEMLEVEL, A.ABSTRACT, P.BOARDNAME2 AS BOARDNAME2, A.WRITERNAME2, A.WRITERDEPTNAME2, A.WRITERCOMPANYNAME2, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_Board_OneLineReply WHERE TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND ITEMID = A.ItemID) ONELINECNT, A.UPPERITEMIDTREE, A.DOCNO, '' AS NOTICE, P.GUBUN, A.MAINCONTENT, P.BOARDGROUPID FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM A INNER JOIN TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO P ON A.TENANT_ID = P.TENANT_ID AND (A.WRITERCOMPANYID = P.COMPANYID OR TRIM(A.WRITERCOMPANYID) = '' OR A.WRITERCOMPANYID IS NULL OR TRIM(P.COMPANYID) = '' OR P.COMPANYID IS NULL) AND A.BOARDID = P.BOARDID LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER( PARTITION BY PARENTITEMID ORDER BY VERSION DESC ) RN, ITEMID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_BOARD_MODIFYHISTORY ) M1 WHERE M1.RN = 1 ) M2 ON A.ITEMID = M2.ITEMID LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 0 THEN 'NONE' WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 1 THEN MAX(TO_CHAR(FILENAME)) ELSE 'MANY' END AS EXT, CASE WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 0 THEN 'NONE' WHEN COUNT(FILEPATH) = 1 THEN MAX(TO_CHAR(FILEPATH)) ELSE 'MANY' END AS FILEPATH, TENANT_ID, itemid FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_ATTACHMENTS GROUP BY ITEMID, TENANT_ID ) F ON A.ITEMID = F.ITEMID AND A.TENANT_ID = F.TENANT_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND P.GUBUN != '5' AND (A.WRITERCOMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# OR TRIM(A.WRITERCOMPANYID) = '' OR A.WRITERCOMPANYID IS NULL OR TRIM(P.COMPANYID) = '' OR P.COMPANYID IS NULL)
AND (A.APPRFLAG = 'Y' OR A.APPRFLAG IS NULL) AND A.STARTDATE <= #nowDate# AND A.ENDDATE > #nowDate# AND (P.VERSIONMANAGE = 'Y' AND M2.ITEMID IS NOT NULL OR P.VERSIONMANAGE = 'N') AND P.PARENTBOARDID = #boardID#
AND P.BOARDID IN
#childBoardIDs[]#
) T1
WHERE RNUM <= #v_PENDROW# ) T2 WHERE RNUM >= #v_PSTARTROW#
